items.descriptionHtml:
Role

The Head of AI will be responsible for defining and executing Tata Consulting Engineers’ enterprise-wide AI strategy, driving both internal transformation and external digital business growth.

This role will lead the creation of an AI-first, agentic enterprise, embedding AI across the full value chain (sales, engineering, delivery, HR, finance, legal, and proposals), while also building a market-facing Industrial AI portfolio aligned with TCE’s Digital Twin strategy.

The role combines vision, execution, productization, and monetization, with accountability for delivering measurable business outcomes including productivity gains, faster project delivery, and new revenue streams (ARR-based AI products and platforms).


Key Responsibilities

1. Enterprise AI Transformation (Internal Focus)

  • Define and execute TCE’s roadmap to become an AI-native, agentic enterprise
  • Drive AI adoption across core business functions:
  • Engineering & design automation
  • Sales & proposal intelligence
  • Project delivery optimization
  • HR, finance, legal process automation
  • Build AI awareness and capability across the organization, including leadership alignment and workforce upskilling
  • Establish AI governance, ethics, and responsible AI frameworks
  • Lead development of enterprise AI copilots and agents to improve productivity and decision-making
  • Deliver measurable outcomes:
  • Reduction in project cycle times
  • Increased engineering efficiency
  • Improved win rates and margins


2. Industrial AI Business (External / Revenue Focus)

  • Build TCE’s Industrial AI capability as part of the Digital Business Unit
  • Define and launch AI-led offerings integrated with Digital Twin solutions
  • Create a scalable Industrial AI backbone/platform aligned with:
  • Simulation-driven design
  • Smart infrastructure
  • Asset lifecycle intelligence
  • Develop AI-powered products and solutions targeting industries such as:
  • Infrastructure & urban development
  • Energy & utilities
  • Manufacturing & industrial plants
  • Drive productization and monetization:
  • Build ARR-based AI products/platforms
  • Define pricing, packaging, and GTM strategy
  • Lead customer engagements for AI-led transformation programs


3. AI Platform & Product Leadership

  • Oversee development of TCE’s AI platform architecture
  • Data pipelines, model lifecycle, orchestration layers
  • Integration with digital twin environments
  • Guide AI Product Manager in building scalable, reusable AI products
  • Ensure alignment between:
  • Platform capabilities
  • Business use cases
  • Market needs


4. Ecosystem & Partnerships

  • Build and manage strategic partnerships with:
  • Hyperscalers and AI platforms
  • Industrial AI and simulation players
  • Startups and academia
  • Leverage partnerships to accelerate:
  • Capability building
  • Joint GTM initiatives
  • Innovation and co-development
  • Position TCE as a thought leader in Industrial AI and Digital Twin convergence


5. Innovation & Thought Leadership

  • Establish TCE as a leader in:
  • Agentic AI in engineering and infrastructure
  • AI + Digital Twin convergence
  • Drive innovation programs, PoCs, and pilots
  • Represent TCE in industry forums, client discussions, and strategic engagements


Key Focus Areas (Critical Success Priorities)

Year 1 Priorities

  • Establish AI governance, operating model, and roadmap
  • Launch 3–5 high-impact internal AI use cases (quick wins)
  • Build foundational AI platform and data readiness
  • Define and pilot Industrial AI offerings
  • Create initial AI product portfolio roadmap

Medium-Term (2–3 Years)

  • Transition TCE into a scaled AI-enabled enterprise
  • Launch commercial AI products with ARR revenue streams
  • Deep integration of AI into Digital Twin solutions
  • Build a strong AI talent and capability pipeline


Candidate Profile

Experience

  • 15+ years of experience in AI, data, or digital transformation
  • Proven track record of:
  • Scaling AI initiatives in enterprises
  • Building AI products/platforms
  • Driving business impact through AI
  • Experience in industrial sectors (EPC, infrastructure, manufacturing, energy) strongly preferred
  • Exposure to Digital Twin, simulation, or engineering systems is a strong advantage


Technical & Functional Expertise

  • Strong understanding of:
  • AI/ML, GenAI, and Agentic AI architectures
  • Enterprise AI platforms and MLOps
  • Data strategy and governance
  • Experience in building:
  • AI-driven products
  • Scalable platforms
  • Enterprise-wide AI adoption frameworks


Leadership & Behavioral Competencies

  • Strategic thinker with execution rigor
  • Ability to bridge technology, engineering, and business
  • Strong stakeholder management (CxO-level influence)
  • Entrepreneurial mindset with focus on value creation and monetization
  • Proven ability to build and lead high-performing teams


Key Success Metrics

  • AI adoption across business functions (% coverage)
  • Productivity and efficiency improvements
  • Revenue from AI-led offerings (ARR contribution)
  • Number of AI products successfully launched
  • Customer impact and satisfaction from AI solutions
  • Strength of AI ecosystem partnerships


Why This Role is Critical

This role sits at the intersection of engineering excellence, digital innovation, and business transformation, and will define how TCE evolves into:

  • An AI-first engineering enterprise
  • A leader in Industrial AI + Digital Twin solutions
  • A platform-led digital business with recurring revenue streams

items.descriptionHtml:
Join phData, a dynamic and innovative leader in the modern data stack. We partner with major cloud data platforms like Snowflake, AWS, Azure, GCP, Fivetran, Pinecone, Glean, and dbt to deliver cutting-edge services and solutions. We're committed to helping global enterprises overcome their toughest data challenges.

phData is a remote-first global company with employees based in the United States, Latin America, and India. We celebrate the culture of each of our team members and foster a community of technological curiosity, ownership, and trust. Even though we're growing extremely fast, we maintain a casual, exciting work environment. We hire top performers and allow you the autonomy to deliver results.

  • 6x Snowflake Partner of the Year (2020, 2021, 2022, 2023, 2024, 2025)
  • Fivetran, dbt, Atlation, and AWS Partner of the Year
  • #1 Partner in Snowflake Advanced Certifications
  • 600+ Expert Cloud Certifications (Sigma, AWS, Azure, Dataiku, etc)

Recognized as an award-winning workplace in the US, India, and LATAM

Role Overview

We are looking for a Director of AI/ML to join our Machine Learning & AI practice team. In this role, you will build and lead phData’s India-based Agentic Delivery Center from the ground up, transforming bespoke client needs into scalable AI/ML platforms, agentic solutions, and accelerators. You will collaborate closely with global leadership, founding engineers, and cross-functional delivery teams to define architectural standards, scale a high-performing engineering organization, and ensure delivery excellence for our most strategic customers. You will serve as both a hands-on principal architect and senior consulting leader, aligning technical execution to clear business value and outcomes.

Key Responsibilities

Client Delivery

  • Own and drive the design and delivery of production-grade agentic AI/ML solutions and platforms for global enterprise clients.
  • Translate complex business requirements into opinionated, prescriptive architectures and implementation plans that leverage modern agentic stacks, LLMs, and cloud-native AI/ML platforms.
  • Lead Zero-to-One delivery for the India Agentic Delivery Center, taking engagements from initial discovery through to production-ready agents and closed-loop intelligence workflows.
  • Ensure engagements are delivered on time, within scope, and with measurable business value for clients, including under fixed-price and outcome-based commercial models.
  • Communicate the business value, ROI, and risks of agentic solutions to both technical and non-technical stakeholders, including executive and C-level audiences.

Collaboration & Leadership

  • Collaborate with cross-functional partners including global leadership, forward-deployed US-based engineers, data engineering, analytics, partner, and marketing teams to deliver successful client engagements.
  • Partner with the Global Leadership team to prioritize agentic solutions and accelerators based on market demand, key technology stacks (e.g., Snowflake, AWS), and phData’s strategic roadmap.
  • Provide technical and strategic leadership during client workshops, discovery sessions, architecture reviews, and delivery governance forums.
  • Serve as the primary point of escalation for India-based delivery, resolving technical issues, client misalignments, and performance concerns with urgency and ownership.
  • Ensure high quality in deliverables through engineering best practices, including robust SDLC processes, code reviews, documentation, testing, and production-readiness standards.

Practice & Firm Contribution

  • Architect and stand up the foundational India Agentic Delivery Center, designing delivery models, operating mechanisms, and integrations with the broader consulting organization.
  • Recruit, onboard, and develop an elite team of architects and engineers, setting a high technical bar and ensuring consistent performance management and calibration.
  • Drive the development of reusable accelerators, modular agentic codebases, and solution templates that can be applied across clients and industries.
  • Contribute to internal initiatives such as IP development, capability management, partner engagement, and thought leadership aligned to AI/ML and agentic architectures.
  • Represent phData with professionalism in all interactions, communicating clearly with both technical and non-technical stakeholders and acting as the face of the India agentic team with clients.

Additional Responsibilities (Senior / Lead / Principal Roles)

  • Act as a trusted advisor to senior client stakeholders and C-suite executives, shaping AI/ML and agentic roadmaps, influencing strategic decisions, and guiding long-term transformation initiatives.
  • Mentor and coach architects and engineers, fostering a culture of extreme ownership, high performance, continuous learning, and feedback.
  • Help define and refine global practice standards, technical bars, and delivery frameworks for agentic AI/ML solutions, ensuring alignment across regions.
  • Drive strategic growth of the Agentic Delivery Center by identifying new opportunities, informing go-to-market strategies, and partnering with alliances and marketing on field-facing assets.

About You

You are a high-performance, hands-on technical leader and client-focused consultant who thrives in Zero-to-One environments and takes extreme ownership of outcomes. You are comfortable building and scaling engineering teams from the ground up, setting clear technical and performance standards, and making decisive hiring and coaching decisions. You enjoy solving complex problems at the intersection of AI/ML, agents, and cloud platforms, and you communicate business value and risk with clarity to senior stakeholders. You are energized by working in a distributed, global organization and collaborating across time zones to deliver transformative results for clients.

Experience

Required Qualifications

  • 14–18 years of experience in the IT industry, preferably within IT services or consulting organizations.
  • 8+ years as a hands-on architect with a proven track record of designing and implementing production-grade AI/ML platforms and solutions.
  • 5+ years of leadership experience in a Zero-to-One environment, building and scaling high-performing engineering teams from the ground up.
  • 3+ years of consulting leadership experience, including leading projects, maintaining client relationships, and aligning technical solutions to business value.
  • Demonstrated experience delivering complex technical projects under fixed-price or outcome-based commercial models, with a focus on project margins and delivery efficiency.

Technical / Functional Skills

  • Deep technical understanding of Large Language Models (LLMs), agentic architectures, and retrieval frameworks, including building modular solutions and accelerators reusable across clients.
  • Hands-on experience with LLM orchestration frameworks (e.g., LangChain, LlamaIndex) and the broader agentic stack beyond standard GenAI chat applications.
  • Deep expertise in cloud-native AI/ML platforms (e.g., AWS SageMaker, Bedrock, GCP Vertex AI, Azure ML, AI Studio, Databricks) and building robust, automated data and ML pipelines.
  • Proven experience deploying and maintaining machine learning models in production environments with an emphasis on scalability, reliability, monitoring, and lifecycle management.
  • Demonstrated expertise using agentic AI and assisted development tooling and methodologies to accelerate delivery while ensuring quality and alignment of deliverables.
  • End-to-end ownership of the Software Development Lifecycle (SDLC), including design, development, testing, deployment, observability, and incident response for AI/ML solutions.

Consulting / Delivery Skills

  • Experience delivering projects for external or internal clients in a professional services or consulting environment.
  • Ability to break down complex AI/ML and agentic challenges into structured, actionable workstreams and drive them through to successful completion.
  • Demonstrated experience navigating complex, multi-stakeholder client environments, including US-based enterprises, and influencing senior and C-level stakeholders.
  • Strong written and verbal communication skills in English, including the ability to clearly articulate technical concepts, trade-offs, and business value.

Collaboration & Ownership

  • Proven track record of building, leading, and collaborating with distributed, cross-functional engineering teams across regions.
  • Demonstrated ability to take extreme ownership of delivery outcomes, manage multiple priorities, and resolve high-pressure escalations with composure and rigor.
  • Commitment to cultivating a high-performance, feedback-driven culture centered on accountability, continuous improvement, and delivery excellence.

Education - If desired

  • 4-year Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related technical field (or equivalent practical experience).

Preferred Qualifications

  • Master’s or PhD in Data Science, Computer Science, or a related quantitative field.
  • Experience leading internal practice initiatives such as capability management, partner engagement (e.g., AWS, Google, Azure), or marketing activities (e.g., writing whitepapers, blogs, or case studies).
  • Active contributions to the open-source community or a portfolio of relevant side projects demonstrating a passion for staying at the forefront of AI and agentic technologies.
  • Industry expertise in one or more of Health sciences, Retail, or Manufacturing.
  • Prior experience working in global or remote teams and partnering across US, LATAM, and India.

Location & Time Zone Expectations

This role is based in India (with a primary presence in Bangalore) and operates primarily in India Standard Time (IST), with regular collaboration overlap with US-based stakeholders.

  • We are a remote-first company, and you should be comfortable working with a distributed global team.
  • Some flexibility may be required to collaborate across time zones with colleagues and clients.
  • Client needs may occasionally require flexibility in working hours to support key milestones, workshops, or escalations.

Why phData?

  • Impactful Work: Partner with leading organizations on meaningful data & AI initiatives.
  • Collaborative Culture: Work with a supportive, high-performing global team that values transparency, autonomy, and continuous improvement.
  • Growth Opportunities: Access to challenging projects, mentorship, and structured development pathways.
  • Values-Driven: We prioritize doing the right thing for our clients, our teams, and our community.

Benefits At PhData

  • Remote-First Workplace
  • Medical Insurance for Self & Family
  • Medical Insurance for Parents
  • Term Life & Personal Accident
  • Wellness Allowance
  • Broadband Reimbursement
  • Continuous learning and growth opportunities to enhance your skills and expertise
  • Other benefits include paid certifications, professional development allowance, and bonuses for creating for company-approved content

phData celebrates diversity and is committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees. Our approach helps us to build a winning team that represents a variety of backgrounds, perspectives, and abilities. So, regardless of how your diversity expresses itself, you can find a home here at phData. We are proud to be an equal opportunity employer. We prohibit discrimination and harassment of any kind based on race, color, religion, national origin, sex (including pregnancy), sexual orientation, gender identity, gender expression, age, veteran status, genetic information, disability, or other applicable legally protected characteristics. If you would like to request an accommodation due to a disability, please contact us at People Operations.

items.title: Director of Artificial Intelligence
items.description: You are the Technical Visionary and Operational Anchor for our AI Engineering capability. You are a pragmatic leader who understands that AI is not a magic wand—it is a powerful tool for Process-First Business Improvement.This is a mandate to stop "experimenting" and start "solving." You don't just lead data scientists; you orchestrate the convergence of Advanced AI capabilities and Complex Business Logic. Your mission is to deconstruct chaotic domain processes (in Healthcare, SCM, Logistics, FinTech) and reconstruct them as intelligent, autonomous workflows.This Seat is for You If..You are a "Process-First" technologist. You believe that an AI model is worthless if it doesn't fundamentally improve the underlying business process. You possess the brain of an engineer to build scalable architectures, the eye of a process analyst to spot inefficiencies, and the hands of a builder to code, review, and deploy agentic solutions that work in the real world.You are not just a Director; you are the Bridge that turns "Artificial Intelligence" into "Business Impact," ensuring that every line of code serves a process, and every process serves a purpose.What are we looking forreal solver?Solver? Absolutely. But not the usual kind. We're searching for the architects of the audacious & the pioneers of the possible. If you're the type to dismantle assumptions, re-engineer ‘best practices,’ and build solutions that make the future possible NOW, then you're speaking our language.Improver. Solver. Futurist.Great sense of humor.‘Possible. It is.’ Mindset.Compassionate collaborator. Bold experimenter. Tireless iterator.Natural creativity that doesn’t just challenge the norm, but solves to design what’s better.Thinks in systems. Solves at scale.This Isn’t for Everyone. But if you’re the kind who questions why things are done a certain way— and then identifies 3 better ways to do it — we’d love to chat with you.Your Responsibilitieswhat you will wake up to solve.Process-First AI Strategy: You will drive the philosophy that Process drives Tech. You will lead teams to identify broken, manual workflows in client environments and design AI architectures that don't just automate them, but eliminate the friction entirely.Build the "AI Factory": You will move us away from bespoke, one-off projects to industrialized solution delivery. You will build reusable AI assets, accelerators, and frameworks (like document extraction engines or reconciliation agents) that can be deployed rapidly across different client contexts.The "Agentic" Shift: You will lead the transition from simple predictive models to Agentic Workflows. You will build systems where AI agents can plan, reason, and execute complex tasks autonomously to solve intricate business problems.Engineering Rigor & Governance: You will enforce LLMOps/MLOps best practices. You are responsible for ensuring our AI solutions are not black boxes—they must be versioned, monitored, cost-optimized, and explainable.Consultative Engineering: You will partner with business leaders to translate vague "AI ambitions" into concrete, process-centric engineering roadmaps. You will define how we solve, not just what we build.Talent & Culture: You will mentor a high-performance squad of AI Engineers and Data Scientists. You will teach them to look beyond the algorithm and understand the business outcome.Welcome to SearceThe ‘process-first’, AI-native modern tech consultancy that's rewriting the rules.We don’t do traditional.As an engineering-led consultancy, we are dedicated to relentlessly improving the real business outcomes. items.descriptionHtml:
You are the Technical Visionary and Operational Anchor for our AI Engineering capability. You are a pragmatic leader who understands that AI is not a magic wand—it is a powerful tool for Process-First Business Improvement.

This is a mandate to stop "experimenting" and start "solving." You don't just lead data scientists; you orchestrate the convergence of Advanced AI capabilities and Complex Business Logic. Your mission is to deconstruct chaotic domain processes (in Healthcare, SCM, Logistics, FinTech) and reconstruct them as intelligent, autonomous workflows.

This Seat is for You If..You are a "Process-First" technologist. You believe that an AI model is worthless if it doesn't fundamentally improve the underlying business process. You possess the brain of an engineer to build scalable architectures, the eye of a process analyst to spot inefficiencies, and the hands of a builder to code, review, and deploy agentic solutions that work in the real world.


You are not just a Director; you are the Bridge that turns "Artificial Intelligence" into "Business Impact," ensuring that every line of code serves a process, and every process serves a purpose.


What are we looking for

real solver?

Solver? Absolutely. But not the usual kind. We're searching for the architects of the audacious & the pioneers of the possible. If you're the type to dismantle assumptions, re-engineer ‘best practices,’ and build solutions that make the future possible NOW, then you're speaking our language.

  • Improver. Solver. Futurist.
  • Great sense of humor.
  • ‘Possible. It is.’ Mindset.
  • Compassionate collaborator. Bold experimenter. Tireless iterator.
  • Natural creativity that doesn’t just challenge the norm, but solves to design what’s better.
  • Thinks in systems. Solves at scale.


This Isn’t for Everyone. But if you’re the kind who questions why things are done a certain way— and then identifies 3 better ways to do it — we’d love to chat with you.


Your Responsibilities

what you will wake up to solve.


  • Process-First AI Strategy: You will drive the philosophy that Process drives Tech. You will lead teams to identify broken, manual workflows in client environments and design AI architectures that don't just automate them, but eliminate the friction entirely.
  • Build the "AI Factory": You will move us away from bespoke, one-off projects to industrialized solution delivery. You will build reusable AI assets, accelerators, and frameworks (like document extraction engines or reconciliation agents) that can be deployed rapidly across different client contexts.
  • The "Agentic" Shift: You will lead the transition from simple predictive models to Agentic Workflows. You will build systems where AI agents can plan, reason, and execute complex tasks autonomously to solve intricate business problems.
  • Engineering Rigor & Governance: You will enforce LLMOps/MLOps best practices. You are responsible for ensuring our AI solutions are not black boxes—they must be versioned, monitored, cost-optimized, and explainable.
  • Consultative Engineering: You will partner with business leaders to translate vague "AI ambitions" into concrete, process-centric engineering roadmaps. You will define how we solve, not just what we build.
  • Talent & Culture: You will mentor a high-performance squad of AI Engineers and Data Scientists. You will teach them to look beyond the algorithm and understand the business outcome.


Welcome to Searce

The ‘process-first’, AI-native modern tech consultancy that's rewriting the rules.

We don’t do traditional.

As an engineering-led consultancy, we are dedicated to relentlessly improving the real business outcomes. Our solvers co-innovate with clients to futurify operations and make processes smarter, faster & better. We build alongside our clients. Not for the vanity metrics. But for the transformation to embed lasting competitive advantage for our clients.

The result? Modern business reinvention, built on math, tech, and clarity of purpose.


The DNA of a ‘Searcian’

superpowers we value.

The ‘happier’ core

  • happier-at-heart: humble, adaptable, positive, passionate, innovative, excellence-minded, responsible.
  • happier-in-action: Not just a poster on the wall; It's how we make decisions, treat each other, show up for clients & hire or promote people.
  • Thinks like a founder. Acts like an owner.
  • Always in Beta: Relentless curiosity. Openness to learn, un-learn, and re-learn.
  • Real Optimist: Views all setbacks as opportunities.
  • Believes in truth over comfort. Ideas over titles. Learning over knowing.
  • Embraces chaos with calm. Evolves faster than the market.


Functional Skills


1. Strategic Delivery Orchestration


  • Strategic Planning & Foresight: Skill in actively defining and contributing to the long-range strategic plan for translating objectives into actionable technical roadmaps that achieve enterprise value and revenue goals.
  • AI Portfolio Optimization: Proven experience in managing and optimizing key operational metrics, including maximizing billable AI utilization, resource allocation efficiency, and cost control across the P&L. You are the steward of commercial success, guaranteeing all model deployments are inherently profitable, scalable, and cost-effective.
  • Client Advocacy & Revenue Growth: Skill in cultivating and maintaining trusted client partnerships. Drives strategic engagement that results in repeat business and expanded client portfolios within the region.
  • Contract & Risk Governance: High proficiency in reviewing and managing complex project agreements (SoW), mitigating delivery risks, and navigating commercial negotiations to safeguard BU profitability.


2. Architectural Authority & Innovation Charter (Technical Oversight)


  • Technical Mitigation and Intervention: Expertly manages complex technical emergencies, personally intervening to troubleshoot and eliminate challenging ML or MLOps constraints and resource deficiencies. This ensures the protection of client timelines, technical commitments, and the guaranteed performance of deployed models.
  • Cloud-Native AI Command: Holds deep technical knowledge of modern AI system design (e.g., Generative AI Frameworks, Autonomous Agent Architectures, and Inference Optimization techniques) across major public cloud providers (GCP, AWS). Possesses the authority to personally validate and recalibrate complex architectural roadmaps, guaranteeing they are future-proof and technically feasible
  • Advanced Domain Portfolio: Maintains strong functional mastery and experience across the comprehensive AI ecosystem, including Data Intelligence, Applied AI Engineering, and AI-led Process Transformation, enabling a cohesive and holistic approach to client digital transformation.
  • End-to-End Project Management: Expertly manage all aspects of a project, including scope, budget, timelines, and stakeholder communication. Accountable for the entire delivery, not just the technical parts.
  • Talent Strategy & Mentorship: Drive the hiring and development of specialized talent. You will be responsible for defining and optimizing effective team structures while proactively fostering an environment that champions creative problem-solving and technical agility.


Tech Superpowers


  • Gen AI Innovation Architect: Actively impact-engineers cutting-edge AI advancements (e.g., Generative AI, Foundation Models, Reinforcement Learning) into actionable architectural roadmaps. Redefining immediate enterprise value through technical innovation and intelligent AI solutions.
  • Deep AI Core Expertise: Possesses deep hands-on expertise across the modern AI stack, including LLMs, RAG pipelines, conversational AI, and automation frameworks, ensuring technical feasibility and excellence across all initiatives.
  • Multi-Cloud MLOps Mastery: Commands production systems and architectural integration across all hyperscalers: AWS (SageMaker, Bedrock), Azure (OpenAI, Cognitive Services), and GCP (Vertex AI). You are skilled in deployment pipelines, monitoring, evaluation, and responsible scaling for enterprise-grade performance.
  • Technical Integrity & Ethical Governance: Establishes and audits mandatory technical quality benchmarks, ensuring strict adherence to rigorous policies regarding model validation, automated testing coverage, and ethical governance.


Experience & Relevance


  • Possesses 12+ years of comprehensive experience in AI, Machine Learning, or solutions architecture, specifically within complex, enterprise-level environments.
  • Leadership Track Record: Proven success in formal technical leadership roles, including hands-on experience managing and mentoring technical architecture teams.
  • Client-Facing Lead: Demonstrated hands-on experience as an AI/ML Product Lead, Data Science Manager, or Technical Architect in client-facing capacities. This involves directly building, implementing, and advising on complex AI solutions, consistently acting as the trusted technical authority for strategic clients.
  • Delivery & Advisory Record: Strong, verifiable record of successful client-facing delivery and providing high-level technical advisory leadership, ensuring solutions transition from concept to measurable business impact.
  • Applied AI & Domain Expertise: Hands-On AI Deployment: Extensive hands-on experience deploying AI-powered workflows, copilots, and automation solutions in production environments.


Join the ‘real solvers’

ready to futurify?

If you are excited by the possibilities of what an AI-native engineering-led, modern tech consultancy can do to futurify businesses, apply here and experience the ‘Art of the possible’. Don’t Just Send a Resume. Send a Statement.

items.descriptionHtml:
About the job

Head of AI – Agentic Systems & Security Intelligence

London, UK (Remote) | Full-Time | Permanent | Cybersecurity / AI


Placed by Hotsourced – connecting top Indian talent with world-class global companies


We’re partnering with a fast-growing, venture-backed cybersecurity startup building a next-generation AI-powered security platform for SMBs. The company has transformed years of real-world MSSP expertise and proprietary threat intelligence into a powerful agentic AI system that detects, reasons, and responds to threats across environments with human oversight.

This is a rare opportunity to lead and scale a truly differentiated AI capability at the core of the business. You’ll work directly with founders and take full ownership of the AI roadmap, architecture, and delivery as the company evolves toward a production-grade, cost-efficient intelligence engine.


Company Overview / About Us

Our client is a cutting-edge cybersecurity startup focused on democratizing enterprise-grade security for small and medium-sized businesses. Built on years of operational experience and deep threat intelligence, their platform leverages hybrid AI architectures to automate detection, investigation, and response workflows.

With strong early traction, live customers, and fresh seed funding secured, they are now scaling their AI capabilities to deliver even more powerful, reliable, and cost-effective solutions to market.


Job Summary / Role Overview

As the Head of AI, you will lead the technical vision, development, and scaling of the company’s agentic AI platform. Reporting directly to the CTO/CPO, you will operate across three dimensions: hands-on architecture, technical leadership, and strategic ownership.

You’ll inherit an advanced hybrid system combining deterministic orchestration (LangGraph) with LLM-based reasoning layers (AWS Bedrock/Claude), and your mission will be to evolve this into a scalable, production-ready intelligence engine—including leading a strategic transition toward in-house LLM infrastructure.

This is a high-impact leadership role with full accountability for performance, cost, and reliability of the AI system.


Key Responsibilities

Delivery & Ownership

  • Own and execute the end-to-end AI roadmap, including planning, prioritisation, and delivery
  • Serve as the single point of accountability for AI system performance, reliability, and cost efficiency
  • Translate complex AI metrics (cost, accuracy, system health) into actionable insights for leadership

Architecture & Engineering

  • Extend and optimise the LangGraph-based multi-agent architecture
  • Enhance deterministic routing, state machines, and agent orchestration pipelines
  • Maintain and evolve the LLM reasoning layer for complex analysis and decision-making
  • Develop efficient dynamic tool/skill dispatch systems to reduce hallucination and cost overhead
  • Collaborate with backend teams on FastAPI services, AWS infrastructure, and CI/CD pipelines
  • Implement advanced capabilities including incident correlation, anomaly detection, and behavioural risk modelling

Strategic Migration (LLM Infrastructure)

  • Lead the transition from AWS Bedrock to self-hosted/open-source LLMs
  • Evaluate models (e.g., LLaMA, Mistral) for reasoning quality, scalability, and cost efficiency
  • Design a phased, low-risk migration strategy with fallback mechanisms
  • Own cost modelling across GPU infrastructure, fine-tuning, and inference pipelines
  • Ensure compliance with UK/EU data residency and security requirements

Team Leadership

  • Provide mentorship and technical direction to AI engineers and data scientists
  • Align data science outputs (RAG pipelines, embeddings, knowledge graphs) with system architecture
  • Define and enforce engineering standards and best practices
  • Act as a strategic partner to leadership, contributing to product and technical decisions


Required Qualifications / What We're Looking For

  • 7+ years of experience in AI/ML engineering
  • 3+ years working on production-grade LLM or agentic systems
  • Proven experience owning AI systems end-to-end (architecture to production)
  • Strong Python expertise and experience with LangGraph, LangChain, or similar frameworks
  • Deep understanding of hybrid AI architectures (deterministic + LLM-based systems)
  • Hands-on experience with open-source LLM deployment and fine-tuning
  • Experience with RAG pipelines, vector databases (e.g., Qdrant), and graph databases (Neo4j preferred)
  • Strong AWS experience (Bedrock, Lambda, EC2, S3, DynamoDB)
  • Expertise in prompt engineering, token optimisation, and cost governance
  • Experience leading or mentoring technical teams


Preferred Skills / Nice to Have

  • Background in cybersecurity or security operations
  • Familiarity with tools like Splunk, Cribl, or similar log pipelines
  • Experience in anomaly detection, behavioural modelling, or risk scoring
  • Knowledge of multi-tenant SaaS architectures and secure API design
  • Familiarity with MITRE ATT&CK framework or threat intelligence workflows
  • Experience with agent frameworks such as AWS Strands or Anthropic patterns
  • Exposure to GPU infrastructure planning or on-prem LLM deployment


Work Schedule

  • Flexible working hours aligned with UK business operations
  • Collaboration overlap expected with UK time zone (GMT)


Benefits / What We Offer

  • Competitive salary with meaningful equity in a funded startup
  • Direct collaboration with experienced founders from leading global organisations
  • Opportunity to build and scale a cutting-edge AI system from the ground up
  • Fully remote flexibility or optional London-based work
  • High-impact role with significant ownership and growth potential

We are hiring: Head of AI/ML Products Technologies


Electronics | Smart Connected Products | AI/ML | IoT | Embedded Systems

We are looking for a senior technology leader to drive the next phase of AI/ML adoption and industrialization across AC & Refrigeration products.


This is a strategic leadership role reporting to the Group CTO, with the mandate to build a scalable AI/ML and IoT platform that improves energy efficiency, enables predictive maintenance, and strengthens the organization’s position in smart connected products.


Ideal profile

The role would suit a senior technology leader with around 15 years of experience in building technology platforms, embedded product design, and AI/ML-led product innovation.


Relevant experience may include:

• AI/ML platforms for connected products, IoT, edge devices, or embedded systems

• Smart thermostat, smart meter, AC controls, refrigeration, or similar smart product ecosystems

• Edge AI, cloud plus edge architectures, MLOps, data analytics, predictive algorithms, and optimization models

• Embedded software architecture, RTOS such as ThreadX / FreeRTOS

• Wireless technologies and protocols such as Wi-Fi, BLE, CHIP, REST, MQTT

• AI/ML-enabled processor chips, NPUs, accelerators, and power-optimized embedded AI deployment

• Security protocols for embedded, cloud, and IoT communication

• Design FMEA, Software FMEA, quality governance, and NPD processes

Exposure to air conditioning, refrigeration, building automation, smart home, connected appliances, industrial IoT, energy management, or embedded AI products would be highly relevant.


Key mandate

• Define the long-term AI/ML technology roadmap

• Build AI/ML and IoT capability for smart connected products

• Lead R&D acceleration through POCs and advanced algorithms

• Drive predictive maintenance, energy optimization, and product intelligence

• Establish MLOps and AI quality governance

• Build and mentor a strong AI/ML product technology team

• Work closely with chip manufacturers, cloud vendors, and digital infrastructure partners


Qualification

Master’s degree / PG Diploma in Computer Science, Data Science, Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, or related field.

B.tech/B.E Electronics

Location and company details can be discussed with relevant candidates.

Professionals with strong alignment may share their profiles.


Budget : 70-100LPA max

items.descriptionHtml:
Job Purpose:


We have built the first working version of Azeon — an Agentic AI Customer Support Platform. The technology works. Now we need a product leader who can turn this PoC into areal product that enterprises pay for, deploy, and renew.


This is not a "manage the backlog" job. This is a founding product leadership role — partnering directly with the Founder/CEO and CTO to find first customers, define what Azeon should become, and build the foundation of a global enterprise AI product out of India.


If you have spent your career waiting for a chance to shape a product from zero — its vision, packaging, journey, AI behavior, and market —this is that chance.


About Azeon


Azeon is an Agentic AI Customer Support Platform. It is designed to transform enterprise customer support from a reactive, headcount-driven function into an intelligent, autonomous, outcome-driven experience. The platform understands customer intent, retrieves the right context, takes governed actions across enterprise systems, and escalates to humans only when needed — across voice, chat, email, tickets, and messaging.


Where we are today: First-level PoC is ready. The core agentic capability is working. We are now in customer-validation mode — actively pursuing design partners in BFSI, NBFC, and adjacent support-heavy enterprises.


Where we are going: Repeatable enterprise deployments, a configurable platform that doesn't require custom code per customer, and a defensible product position in the Agentic AI category.

The next 12 months will define what Azeon becomes. The Head of Product will own that definition.



The Role


You will take complete ownership of:


  1. What Azeon becomes as a product over the next 12–24 months
  2. Who we sell to first, what we promise them, and what we explicitly do not
  3. How a customer experiences Azeon — from first demo to deployed agent to ongoing operations
  4. How we package, configure, and price what we have built
  5. The product narrative used in demos, decks, and customer conversations
  6. The line between "product" and "project" — and the discipline of staying on the product side


You will work shoulder-to-shoulder with the Founder/CEO, CTO, AI Architect, engineering team, and the first customers we sign. You will be in customer calls, in demos, in design reviews, and in the room where every meaningful product decision is made. This is a hands-on role. You will write specs, draft demo flows, sketch admin UX, sit on discovery calls, and define what "good" looks like for the AI.


Core Responsibilities


Product Vision, Strategy & Roadmap


  • Own the product vision, strategy, and roadmap for Azeon.
  • Translate Azeon's business goals into a clear, sequenced product plan.
  • Decide what we build, what we configure, what we integrate, and — most importantly — what we deliberately do not.
  • Maintain a clear, current, opinionated roadmap that engineering, sales, and leadership all align on.


Customer Discovery & First-Customer Conversion


  • Be in the room (or on the call) with every meaningful prospect.
  • Run structured discovery with BFSI, NBFC, fintech, and other support-heavy enterprises to understand workflows, SLAs, compliance constraints, and automation appetite.
  • Convert PoC interest into paying design partners — co-own this outcome with the Founder/CEO.
  • Build and operate a lightweight design partner program: clear inputs, clear deliverables, fast feedback loops.
  • Capture, synthesize, and convert every prospect conversation into product insight.


Product-Market Fit & Positioning


  • Define and continually refine Azeon's Ideal Customer Profile (ICP), use-case priority, and positioning.
  • Identify the 1–2 wedge use cases where Azeon undeniably wins, and orient the product around them first.
  • Track and document signals of PMF—qualitative and quantitative — and adjust direction based on evidence, not opinion.
  • Distinguish between "customer loves us" vs. "customer will pay and renew" — and design for the latter.


PoC-to-Product Conversion


  • Take the current PoC and harden it into a repeatable, configurable, deployable product.
  • Identify what in the PoC is reusable, what is single-customer scaffolding, and what must be rebuilt for scale.
  • Define the abstraction layers, configuration model, and extension points that turn one-off implementations into product modules.
  • Reduce custom code per customer over time. This is a measurable, hard target.


Product Packaging, Pricing & Boundaries


  • Define v1 packaging — what modules exist, what is included in which tier, what is an add-on.
  • Develop initial pricing hypothesis based on prospect signal, willingness-to-pay conversations, and competitive benchmarks.
  • Establish and defend product boundaries: what Azeon does, what Azeon does not do, and what we ask customers to handle outside the platform.
  • Build the discipline of saying no to one-off customization requests that do not generalize.


AI Product Experience & Quality


  • Partner with the AI Architect to define how the agent should think, respond, escalate, ask clarifying questions, and handle uncertainty.
  • Define AI quality metrics: containment rate, resolution accuracy, escalation accuracy, hallucination rate, fallback rate, task completion rate, CSAT.
  • Build a structured evaluation framework so AI quality is measurable, comparable, and improvable— not a matter of opinion.
  • Design for trust: enterprises must be able to monitor, control, and improve agent behavior.


Demo, Sales & Go-to-Market Enablement


  • Own the product narrative used in demos and prospect conversations.
  • Build and continuously refine the demo flow — at pre-customer stage, demos are the product.
  • Support sales and presales in solution discussions, RFPs, and proof-of-value conversations.
  • Translate product capability into business outcomes a CXO actually cares about.


Who We Are Looking For:


Experience:


  1. 10–15 years overall in product management, product leadership, or enterprise software product development.
  2. At least one zero-to-one product experience — you have taken a product from PoC or early stage to first paying customers, and ideally beyond.
  3. 4+ years in B2B SaaS or enterprise software, ideally in customer support platforms, contact center solutions, workflow automation, AI products, fintech, or BFSI technology.
  4. Strong exposure to AI, GenAI, conversational AI, agentic AI, or workflow intelligence — not as a buzzword, but as something you have actually built or shipped against.
  5. Experience working closely with engineering, design, sales, presales, and customer-facing teams.


Mindset & Working Style


  1. Comfortable being the only PM in the room and not waiting for org structure to do the job.
  2. Hypothesis-driven — you form sharp opinions, test them in the market, and update them on evidence.
  3. Genuinely customer-curious — you would rather spend an afternoon on a customer call than a week polishing a slide.
  4. Disciplined about scope, focus, and saying no — especially to revenue-coloured requests that would derail the product.
  5. Strategic when zooming out, hands-on when zooming in. Both, on the same day, without complaint.
  6. Direct, structured, and clear in communication. Comfortable challenging engineering, sales, or the founder when needed.


Must-Have Skills


  1. Product thinking and product judgment
  2. Enterprise workflow understanding
  3. Customer discovery and synthesis
  4. Roadmap planning and prioritization
  5. Requirement articulation and product documentation
  6. Data-driven decision-making
  7. Comfort with ambiguity and pre-PMF chaos
  8. Discipline to say no to non-scalable work


Good-to-Have


  1. Hands-on understanding of LLMs, RAG, AI agents, prompt workflows, and AI evaluation.
  2. Familiarity with customer support KPIs: AHT, FCR, CSAT, NPS, deflection, escalation rate, resolution time, cost per ticket.
  3. Exposure to Zendesk, Freshdesk, Salesforce, HubSpot, Intercom, Genesys, Five9,Twilio,WhatsApp Business API, or similar.
  4. BFSI/NBFC workflow understanding — loan servicing, collections, KYC/verification, payment reminders, dispute handling, complaint management.
  5. Familiarity with enterprise security, compliance, and audit expectations.


We are looking for someone who is:


  1. Strategic, but hands-on.
  2. Customer-focused, but commercially practical.
  3. Product-minded, but technically comfortable.
  4. AI-curious, but not blindly AI-driven.
  5. Structured, but comfortable with startup ambiguity.
  6. Strong enough to challenge engineering, sales, and leadership when needed.
  7. Clear in communication and disciplined in prioritization.
  8. Passionate about building a serious enterprise AI product from India for global markets.


Location: Ahmedabad

items.title: Director, Workforce Strategy and Skills (AI Driven)
items.description: About The RoleThe Director of Workforce Strategy and Skills is a strategic leader within the People Experience organization and serves as the head of the Workforce Strategy and Skills Center of Excellence (COE). This role is a key enabler of HARMAN NEXT, the company’s enterprise strategy focused on a relentlessly focused portfolio, a culture built for speed and scale, and making bold moves to win in rapidly evolving markets. As HARMAN operates in a fast changing, highly competitive environment with rising expectations for innovation, speed, and access to critical skills, this role plays a central part in enabling the company’s next phase of growth. This role partners with senior leaders, Centers of Excellence, and People Enablement to reexamine how work is performed today and to define how the workforce operating models and must evolve to remain competitive.This role leads the shift toward a skills-based organization, moving beyond traditional role and job-based models to more agile, skills driven approaches to workforce planning, talent deployment, and development. By leveraging digital platforms, AI, advanced analytics, and human centered design, the Director translates business strategy into actionable workforce solutions that increase organizational agility, unlock internal talent, and improve speed to capability. Through enterprise-wide transformation initiatives, this leader shapes how work gets done, how talent is developed and mobilized, and how culture evolves to support sustained innovation and performance in a rapidly changing landscape.What You Will DoStrategic Leadership, Workforce Transformation and SkillsPartner with business and HR leaders to leverage workforce analytics, employee insights, and labor market data—co‑developing strategies that drive future‑ready workforce outcomes. Co‑lead complex, cross‑functional transformation initiatives by engaging stakeholders in operating model design, restructuring, reskilling, and location strategy, ensuring solutions are jointly designed, aligned, and adopted across the enterprise. Collaborate with digital, technology, and functional teams to embed digital platforms, AI‑driven solutions, and experimentation into skills intelligence, strategic workforce planning, and broader workforce transformation efforts—fostering shared ownership and continuous improvement. Serve as a change agent for skills‑based workforce planning and future‑of‑work initiatives, enabling HARMAN NEXT by evolving workforce models, skills, and operating practices to support speed, scale, and sustained innovation. Workforce Planning, Career Architecture & Skills-Based DesignCollaborate with business and HR partners to co‑design and implement enterprise career architecture—including job structures, skills frameworks, and proficiency expectations—to ensure clarity, consistency, and shared ownership across the organization. Partner with business leaders, Finance, and People Analytics to jointly lead long‑term workforce planning efforts aligned with strategic priorities, future skills, and growth needs, using predictive analytics to shape forward‑looking talent decisions. Co‑create and collaboratively govern enterprise talent and capability programs that support skills enablement, workforce readiness, and internal mobility, ensuring programs are business‑aligned and co‑championed by stakeholders. Design and scale an internal Opportunity Marketplace (projects, gigs, roles, mentorship) that matches employees to work based on skills and aspirations, enabling faster talent deployment, internal mobility, and capability building across the enterprise. Maintain and continuously evolve skills frameworks, taxonomies, and capability models in partnership with functional leaders to ensure they remain consistent, relevant, and reflective of emerging business needs. AI-Enabled Talent & Skills PlatformsCollaborate with leaders and cross‑functional partners to co‑interpret workforce and skills data, equipping them with shared, data‑driven insights that guide talent decisions and workforce planning. Partner closely with HR Technology, People Analytics, and external vendors to jointly scale and enhance digital talent platforms, ensuring solutions are user‑centric, business‑aligned, and built through collective input. Lead the strategy, governance, and adoption of an Opportunity Marketplace platform by partnering with HR Technology and business leaders to define use cases, integrate skills and talent data, and drive a strong, user‑centric employee experience. Work with business and HR stakeholders to translate workforce and skills data into actionable, co‑developed insights that inform investment decisions, prioritization, and long‑term capability building across the enterprise. Inclusive Talent Practices & Early Career PipelinesPartner with HR, business leaders, and talent acquisition teams to co‑embed inclusive, skills‑based hiring and onboarding practices across the enterprise, ensuring shared ownership of equitable talent processes. Collaborate with functional leaders, early career programs, and learning partners to strengthen early career, apprenticeship, and reskilling pipelines through jointly designed, equitable talent identification and development approaches. Apply inclusive, human‑centered design principles in partnership with employees, leaders, and cross‑functional teams to co‑create workforce initiatives that reflect diverse needs and enhance the overall employee experience. Talent Assessment, Selection & Legal DefensibilityCollaborate with HR, business leaders, and cross‑functional partners to co‑design and govern enterprise skills and aptitude assessments for hiring, development, and reskilling, ensuring tools meet shared needs and support equitable talent practices. Partner with Legal, Compliance, and People Analytics teams to ensure assessment programs collectively meet legal, ethical, validity, and adverse‑impact standards, fostering transparent, defensible, and inclusive decision‑making. Advise and consult with HR and business leaders across all levels to co‑develop assessment strategies that align with organizational goals, enhance talent selection quality, and support consistent, fair, and data‑informed talent decisions. Program Leadership, Governance & Agile DeliveryGuide and co‑develop high‑performing teams by using agile methods, shared OKRs, and transparent KPI‑based accountability, fostering a culture of partnership, learning, and continuous improvement. Collaboratively manage portfolios of workforce transformation initiatives by engaging cross‑functional partners in prioritization, solution design, and value realization to ensure outcomes are jointly owned and sustained. Partner with senior leaders to deliver executive‑level updates, insights, and recommendations, ensuring decisions are informed by shared understanding, co‑created strategies, and alignment across key stakeholders. What You NeedDemonstrated expertise in career architecture and skills‑based workforce design, including job structures, skills frameworks, and proficiency‑based expectations that enable internal mobility and targeted development. Experience leading long‑term workforce planning aligned to future skills needs and growth targets, leveraging analytics, predictive modeling, and digital workforce platforms. 10+ years of progressive experience in skills intelligence, strategic workforce planning, workforce strategy and/or workforce transformation (including HR transformation) within complex, global organizations or management consulting. Hands‑on experience with AI‑enabled talent and skills solutions, including advanced analytics or emerging technologies to support workforce insights, learning, and career development. Strong partnership experience across Talent Acquisition, Culture and Belonging, People Analytics, Finance, Operations, and HR Technology to embed inclusive, skills‑based talent practices. Experience designing or governing talent assessment and selection strategies, with understanding of validity, adverse impact, and legal considerations. Bachelor’s degree required; Master’s degree (MBA or related field) preferred. Preferred SkillsStrategic thinker with operational rigor, able to connect skills intelligence, strategic workforce planning, and workforce transformation initiatives to business outcomes and drive measurable impact. Skilled in cross-functional collaboration and influence, partnering effectively across HR, Operations, Finance, Technology, and executive leadership. Comfortable navigating ambiguity and driving enterprise-wide change in dynamic, global environments. Experience in global or matrixed organizations, with a global mindset and cultural fluency Strong analytical, facilitation, and executive communication skills; adept at financial modeling, business case development, and data-driven decision-making. Proven ability to lead cross-functional, enterprise-wide transformation programs, including operating model design, organizational restructures, mergers & acquisitions, and location strategy. Innovative and experimental approach to workforce strategy, with a commitment to continuous improvement and value realization. Passionate about inclusive leadership, coaching, and developing high-potential talent. Strong business acumen and ability to influence at the executive level. What Makes You EligibleBe willing to travel up to 10%, domestic and international travel. Willingness to work from the India office. Any offer of employment is conditioned upon the successful completion of a background investigation. You Belong Here HARMAN is committed to making every employee feel welcomed, valued, and empowered. No matter what role you play, we encourage you to share your ideas, voice your distinct perspective, and bring your whole self with you – all within a support-minded culture that celebrates what makes each of us unique. We also recognize that learning is a lifelong pursuit and want you to flourish. We proudly offer added opportunities for training, development, and continuing education, further empowering you to live the career you want.About HARMAN: Where Innovation Unleashes Next-Level Technology Ever since the 1920s, we’ve been amplifying the sense of sound. Today, that legacy endures, with integrated technology platforms that make the world smarter, safer, and more connected.Across automotive, lifestyle, and digital transformation solutions, we create innovative technologies that turn ordinary moments into extraordinary experiences. Our renowned automotive and lifestyle solutions can be found everywhere, from the music we play in our cars and homes to venues that feature today’s most sought-after performers, while our digital transformation solutions serve humanity by addressing the world’s ever-evolving needs and demands. Marketing our award-winning portfolio under 16 iconic brands, such as JBL, Mark Levinson, and Revel, we set ourselves apart by exceeding the highest engineering and design standards for our customers, our partners and each other.If you’re ready to innovate and do work that makes a lasting impact, join our talent community today!Important Notice: Recruitment ScamsPlease be aware that HARMAN recruiters will always communicate with you from an '@harman.com', ‘@careers.harman.com’ or ‘harmanglobal.avature.net’ email address. We will never ask for payments, banking, credit card, personal financial information or access to your LinkedIn/email account during the screening, interview, or recruitment process. If you are asked for such information or receive communication from an email address not ending in one of the above email domains about a job with HARMAN, please cease communication immediately and report the incident to us through: harmancareers@harman.com.HARMAN is proud to be an Equal Opportunity employer. HARMAN strives to hire the best qualified candidates and is committed to building a workforce representative of the diverse marketplaces and communities of our global colleagues and customers. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, religion, color, national origin, gender (including pregnancy, childbirth, or related medical conditions), sexual orientation, gender identity, gender expression, age, status as a protected veteran, status as an individual with a disability, or other applicable legally protected characteristics. HARMAN attracts, hires, and develops employees based on merit, qualifications and job-related performance.(www.harman.com)

  • Partner with senior leaders to deliver executive‑level updates, insights, and recommendations, ensuring decisions are informed by shared understanding, co‑created strategies, and alignment across key stakeholders.

What You Need

  • Demonstrated expertise in career architecture and skills‑based workforce design, including job structures, skills frameworks, and proficiency‑based expectations that enable internal mobility and targeted development.
  • Experience leading long‑term workforce planning aligned to future skills needs and growth targets, leveraging analytics, predictive modeling, and digital workforce platforms.
  • 10+ years of progressive experience in skills intelligence, strategic workforce planning, workforce strategy and/or workforce transformation (including HR transformation) within complex, global organizations or management consulting.
  • Hands‑on experience with AI‑enabled talent and skills solutions, including advanced analytics or emerging technologies to support workforce insights, learning, and career development.
  • Strong partnership experience across Talent Acquisition, Culture and Belonging, People Analytics, Finance, Operations, and HR Technology to embed inclusive, skills‑based talent practices.
  • Experience designing or governing talent assessment and selection strategies, with understanding of validity, adverse impact, and legal considerations.
  • Bachelor’s degree required; Master’s degree (MBA or related field) preferred.

Preferred Skills

  • Strategic thinker with operational rigor, able to connect skills intelligence, strategic workforce planning, and workforce transformation initiatives to business outcomes and drive measurable impact.
  • Skilled in cross-functional collaboration and influence, partnering effectively across HR, Operations, Finance, Technology, and executive leadership.
  • Comfortable navigating ambiguity and driving enterprise-wide change in dynamic, global environments.
  • Experience in global or matrixed organizations, with a global mindset and cultural fluency
  • Strong analytical, facilitation, and executive communication skills; adept at financial modeling, business case development, and data-driven decision-making.
  • Proven ability to lead cross-functional, enterprise-wide transformation programs, including operating model design, organizational restructures, mergers & acquisitions, and location strategy.
  • Innovative and experimental approach to workforce strategy, with a commitment to continuous improvement and value realization.
  • Passionate about inclusive leadership, coaching, and developing high-potential talent.
  • Strong business acumen and ability to influence at the executive level.

What Makes You Eligible

  • Be willing to travel up to 10%, domestic and international travel.
  • Willingness to work from the India office.
  • Any offer of employment is conditioned upon the successful completion of a background investigation.

You Belong Here

HARMAN is committed to making every employee feel welcomed, valued, and empowered. No matter what role you play, we encourage you to share your ideas, voice your distinct perspective, and bring your whole self with you – all within a support-minded culture that celebrates what makes each of us unique. We also recognize that learning is a lifelong pursuit and want you to flourish. We proudly offer added opportunities for training, development, and continuing education, further empowering you to live the career you want.

About HARMAN: Where Innovation Unleashes Next-Level Technology

Ever since the 1920s, we’ve been amplifying the sense of sound. Today, that legacy endures, with integrated technology platforms that make the world smarter, safer, and more connected.

Across automotive, lifestyle, and digital transformation solutions, we create innovative technologies that turn ordinary moments into extraordinary experiences. Our renowned automotive and lifestyle solutions can be found everywhere, from the music we play in our cars and homes to venues that feature today’s most sought-after performers, while our digital transformation solutions serve humanity by addressing the world’s ever-evolving needs and demands. Marketing our award-winning portfolio under 16 iconic brands, such as JBL, Mark Levinson, and Revel, we set ourselves apart by exceeding the highest engineering and design standards for our customers, our partners and each other.

If you’re ready to innovate and do work that makes a lasting impact, join our talent community today!

Important Notice: Recruitment Scams

Please be aware that HARMAN recruiters will always communicate with you from an '@harman.com', ‘@careers.harman.com’ or ‘harmanglobal.avature.net’ email address. We will never ask for payments, banking, credit card, personal financial information or access to your LinkedIn/email account during the screening, interview, or recruitment process. If you are asked for such information or receive communication from an email address not ending in one of the above email domains about a job with HARMAN, please cease communication immediately and report the incident to us through: harmancareers@harman.com.

HARMAN is proud to be an Equal Opportunity employer. HARMAN strives to hire the best qualified candidates and is committed to building a workforce representative of the diverse marketplaces and communities of our global colleagues and customers. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, religion, color, national origin, gender (including pregnancy, childbirth, or related medical conditions), sexual orientation, gender identity, gender expression, age, status as a protected veteran, status as an individual with a disability, or other applicable legally protected characteristics. HARMAN attracts, hires, and develops employees based on merit, qualifications and job-related performance.(www.harman.com)

items.description: About EarnInAs one of the first pioneers of earned wage access, our passion at EarnIn is building products that deliver real-time financial flexibility for those with the unique needs of living paycheck to paycheck. Our community members access their earnings as they earn them, with options to spend, save, and grow their money without mandatory fees, interest rates, or credit checks.We’re fortunate to have an incredibly experienced leadership team, combined with world-class funding partners like A16Z, Matrix Partners, DST, Ribbit Capital, and a very healthy core business with a tremendous runway. We’re growing fast and are excited to continue bringing world-class talent onboard to help shape the next chapter of our growth journey. POSITION SUMMARY EarnIn is a fintech company where machine learning is embedded across our platform capabilities to power business decisions and customer experiences at scale. From risk and fraud to growth, personalization, and operational efficiency, ML systems are mission‑critical to our success. Ensuring the reliability, performance, and scalability of these systems in production is therefore a core engineering priority. The Head of Machine Learning, India, will be responsible for the success of ML systems built and operated by our India teams. This role sits at the intersection of applied science and engineering excellence, with a strong emphasis on translating research and experimentation into robust, high‑performance production systems. The ideal candidate has deep hands‑on experience deploying ML at scale, thrives in fast‑growing environments, and brings both theoretical grounding and strong production engineering instincts.As EarnIn continues to expand in India, this role will inherit a high‑performing machine learning team, with clear potential to grow and scale the organization over time. As the senior ML leader in‑country, the role may also include site leadership responsibilities, partnering closely with HR and Talent Acquisition on hiring, culture building, and team engagement. This position will be hybrid from our Bengaluru office, as part of our expanding site, with two+ days a week in the office. EarnIn provides excellent employee benefits, including healthcare, internet/cell phone reimbursement, a learning and development stipend, and opportunities to collaborate with and travel to our Mountain View HQ and Bangkok Site. Our salary ranges are determined by role, level, and location. WHAT YOU'LL DO Build, manage, and mentor a high‑performing team of machine learning engineers; foster collaboration, support career growth, and invest in continuous skills development.Own the delivery and impact of ML initiatives, working closely with cross‑functional partners to ensure measurable business outcomes.Lead the design, development, and optimization of ML‑based systems, including techniques such as deep learning and reinforcement learning.Drive a culture of scientific and engineering rigor balanced with real‑world pragmatism, with a strong focus on experimentation, evaluation, and quantifying impact on key engagement and business metrics.Partner with data engineering, product management, and marketing teams to take ML solutions from conception through experimentation to reliable, timely production deployment.Establish India as a strategic ML hub for EarnIn by leading hiring efforts, onboarding, and close partnership with HR and TA on culture building, team health, and local engagement initiatives.WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR MS or Ph.D. in Computer Science, Statistics, or a closely related technical field.7+ years of industry experience, including 3+ years of people management experience.Strong depth across core machine learning algorithms and applied ML techniques.Proven experience building, deploying, and operating production ML systems at scale.Advanced proficiency in Python and SQL, with a strong software engineering foundation.Excellent written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to influence and collaborate across technical and non‑technical stakeholders.  At EarnIn, we believe that the best way to build a financial system that works for everyday people is by hiring a team that represents our diverse community. Our team is diverse not only in background and experience but also in perspective. We celebrate our diversity and strive to create a culture of belonging. EarnIn does not unlawfully discriminate based on race, color, religion, sex (including pregnancy, childbirth, breastfeeding, or related medical conditions), gender identity, gender expression, national origin, ancestry, citizenship, age, physical or mental disability, legally protected medical condition, family care status, military or veteran status, marital status, registered domestic partner status, sexual orientation, genetic information, or any other basis protected by local, state, or federal laws. EarnIn is an E-Verify participant. EarnIn does not accept unsolicited resumes from individual recruiters or third-party recruiting agencies in response to job postings. No fee will be paid to third parties who submit unsolicited candidates directly to our hiring managers or HR team.
items.descriptionHtml:
About EarnIn

As one of the first pioneers of earned wage access, our passion at EarnIn is building products that deliver real-time financial flexibility for those with the unique needs of living paycheck to paycheck. Our community members access their earnings as they earn them, with options to spend, save, and grow their money without mandatory fees, interest rates, or credit checks.

We’re fortunate to have an incredibly experienced leadership team, combined with world-class funding partners like A16Z, Matrix Partners, DST, Ribbit Capital, and a very healthy core business with a tremendous runway. We’re growing fast and are excited to continue bringing world-class talent onboard to help shape the next chapter of our growth journey.

POSITION SUMMARY 
EarnIn is a fintech company where machine learning is embedded across our platform capabilities to power business decisions and customer experiences at scale. From risk and fraud to growth, personalization, and operational efficiency, ML systems are mission‑critical to our success. Ensuring the reliability, performance, and scalability of these systems in production is therefore a core engineering priority. The Head of Machine Learning, India, will be responsible for the success of ML systems built and operated by our India teams. This role sits at the intersection of applied science and engineering excellence, with a strong emphasis on translating research and experimentation into robust, high‑performance production systems. The ideal candidate has deep hands‑on experience deploying ML at scale, thrives in fast‑growing environments, and brings both theoretical grounding and strong production engineering instincts.
As EarnIn continues to expand in India, this role will inherit a high‑performing machine learning team, with clear potential to grow and scale the organization over time. As the senior ML leader in‑country, the role may also include site leadership responsibilities, partnering closely with HR and Talent Acquisition on hiring, culture building, and team engagement. This position will be hybrid from our Bengaluru office, as part of our expanding site, with two+ days a week in the office. EarnIn provides excellent employee benefits, including healthcare, internet/cell phone reimbursement, a learning and development stipend, and opportunities to collaborate with and travel to our Mountain View HQ and Bangkok Site. Our salary ranges are determined by role, level, and location. WHAT YOU'LL DO 
  • Build, manage, and mentor a high‑performing team of machine learning engineers; foster collaboration, support career growth, and invest in continuous skills development.
  • Own the delivery and impact of ML initiatives, working closely with cross‑functional partners to ensure measurable business outcomes.
  • Lead the design, development, and optimization of ML‑based systems, including techniques such as deep learning and reinforcement learning.
  • Drive a culture of scientific and engineering rigor balanced with real‑world pragmatism, with a strong focus on experimentation, evaluation, and quantifying impact on key engagement and business metrics.
  • Partner with data engineering, product management, and marketing teams to take ML solutions from conception through experimentation to reliable, timely production deployment.
  • Establish India as a strategic ML hub for EarnIn by leading hiring efforts, onboarding, and close partnership with HR and TA on culture building, team health, and local engagement initiatives.
WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR 
  • MS or Ph.D. in Computer Science, Statistics, or a closely related technical field.
  • 7+ years of industry experience, including 3+ years of people management experience.
  • Strong depth across core machine learning algorithms and applied ML techniques.
  • Proven experience building, deploying, and operating production ML systems at scale.
  • Advanced proficiency in Python and SQL, with a strong software engineering foundation.
  • Excellent written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to influence and collaborate across technical and non‑technical stakeholders.

 

At EarnIn, we believe that the best way to build a financial system that works for everyday people is by hiring a team that represents our diverse community. Our team is diverse not only in background and experience but also in perspective. We celebrate our diversity and strive to create a culture of belonging. EarnIn does not unlawfully discriminate based on race, color, religion, sex (including pregnancy, childbirth, breastfeeding, or related medical conditions), gender identity, gender expression, national origin, ancestry, citizenship, age, physical or mental disability, legally protected medical condition, family care status, military or veteran status, marital status, registered domestic partner status, sexual orientation, genetic information, or any other basis protected by local, state, or federal laws. EarnIn is an E-Verify participant. 

EarnIn does not accept unsolicited resumes from individual recruiters or third-party recruiting agencies in response to job postings. No fee will be paid to third parties who submit unsolicited candidates directly to our hiring managers or HR team.
