Summary

Location: Hyderabad

Lead, AI is a critical role for innovation to our business, internal & external customers. The lead

Is a critical driver for defining our product vision and strategy for AI space, collaborating with cross-functional teams to bring AI solutions, and ensure alignment with organizational business needs and objectives.

Responsibilities

About the Role

  • Defining Vision and Strategy for AI platforms, align with overall business objectives, Identify key stakeholders and secure executive sponsorship, develop a clear mission statement and goals
  • Responsible for Implementing AI platforms and solutions, while adopting agile methodologies for AI projects, Proof of Concepts (POCs) and Points of View (POVs) Implement iterative development and continuous improvement, Ensure clear communication and stakeholder engagement
  • Conduct activities to explore new use cases, evaluate emerging generative AI models and frameworks, and drive innovation. Foster collaboration and knowledge sharing among different teams and departments working with generative AI, ensuring consistency and alignment across the organization.
  • Establish clear objectives and governance processes for managing priorities, risks, with a strategic foresight and cross-functional collaboration with business units. define reporting lines and decision-making processes, Engage steering committee for oversight
  • Stay Informed on industry AI/AI Trends, attend industry conferences, consortiums and standards bodies and workshops, engage with AI communities and forums, engage with AI startups and technology providers, foster partnerships and collaborations.
  • Establishing a framework for measuring Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) for AI implementations, such as business impact metrics, operational metrics (e.g., process efficiency, time saved), Innovation metrics (e.g., new products/services developed)
  • Develop future AgentOps, LLM/LLMOps capability, operating model, function services related to monitoring, measuring and optimizing. Operationalize LLMOps function and drive continuous improvement
  • Align with organizational/EDM data strategy and management principles, develop data collection and preparation processes, Ensure data quality, security, and compliance for AI solutions

Minimum Requirements

  • Familiarity with architecting and developing complex AI applications
  • Experience with NLP, FMs, LLMs, and other AI/GenAI models
  • Experience with cloud computing platforms like AWS or Microsoft Azure. Understanding of how to deploy LLMs to cloud/ on-premises and use APIs, Agents to build solutions.
  • Familiarity with the development of model lifecycles e.g. AgentOps, MLOps. LLMOps
  • Programming such as Python, R, SPARK, SQL, NLP libraries, AI tools like BERT
  • IT Strategy & Planning ,Influencing and persuading, Managing resources, Priority & goal setting and Quality decision making
  • Implement Enterprise AI platforms adhering to organizational responsible AI practices, conduct regular ethical impact assessments, implement explainable AI techniques, Establish processes for human oversight and intervention
  • Ensure compliance with data privacy and security, implement robust data protection measures, Collaborate with Information security to conduct regular security audits and vulnerability assessments
  • Develop change management strategies for AI adoption, document successful implementations and lessons learned, create reusable components and templates, establish processes for scaling solutions across the organization
  • Evaluate and select appropriate generative AI tools and platforms, Integrate AI solutions with existing systems and workflows, develop custom solutions when necessary
  • Promote the adoption and effective utilization of generative AI across the organization, while mitigating potential risks and ensuring compliance with relevant regulations and policies
  • Serve as a hub for knowledge sharing, learning, and support training related to generative AI technologies and applications.

Why Novartis?

Our purpose is to reimagine medicine to improve and extend people’s lives and our vision is to become the most valued and trusted medicines company in the world. How can we achieve this? With our people. It is our associates that drive us each day to reach our ambitions. Be a part of this mission and join us!

items.descriptionHtml:
Role Overview


The Director - Artificial Intelligence will define and lead the AI vision for MADTECH.AI, driving innovation across Generative AI, advanced marketing analytics, and predictive intelligence. This role combines strategic leadership with deep technical expertise in applied AI within AdTech and MarTech ecosystems.


The incumbent will be responsible for architecting scalable AI systems, building high-performance teams, and delivering measurable business impact across marketing, media, and revenue optimization domains.


Key Responsibilities


1. Generative AI & Large Language Models (Core Strategic Focus)

  • Design AI systems that move beyond descriptive insights to prescriptive and scenario-based decision intelligence.
  • Architect and deploy enterprise-grade GenAI applications, including content intelligence, automated reporting, proactive campaign insights, and conversational analytics.
  • Apply advanced NLP techniques such as sentiment analysis, topic modeling, entity extraction, and text classification to enhance marketing intelligence.
  • Integrate LLM-driven intelligence into predictive workflows, automation systems, and decision-support platforms.
  • Establish governance frameworks for Responsible AI, bias mitigation, explainability, and compliance.


2. Advanced Marketing Analytics Leadership

  • Provide executive oversight for development and deployment of:
  • Marketing Mix Modeling (MMM)
  • Multi-Touch Attribution (MTA)
  • Propensity, RFM, and lifetime value modeling
  • Bayesian and non-parametric modeling techniques
  • Institutionalize experimentation frameworks (A/B testing, incrementality testing, statistical significance validation).
  • Drive AI-led transformation of campaign performance measurement and marketing ROI attribution.
  • Establish analytical best practices across the AI function.
  • Develop vertical-specific AI accelerators and intelligence frameworks tailored to priority industry segments (e.g., nonprofit, higher education, healthcare, retail).


3. Predictive Modeling & Revenue Optimization

  • Lead the development of predictive models to optimize:
  • Revenue growth
  • Audience behavior forecasting
  • Bid strategy automation
  • Inventory yield optimization
  • Leverage campaign and media trading datasets to improve eCPM, fill rates, conversion rates, and ROI.
  • Enable cross-channel optimization across display, video, mobile, social, native, advanced TV, and audio ecosystems.
  • Build real-time or near-real-time intelligence layers to power automated decision-making.


4. Data Platforms & AI Architecture

  • Architect scalable data platforms integrating audience, contextual, pricing, and transactional datasets.
  • Define canonical marketing data models to enable cross-client benchmarking and collective intelligence frameworks.
  • Lead AI-driven automation of connector discovery, schema mapping, anomaly detection, and intelligent data normalization to support scalable multi-source integrations.
  • Oversee integrations with DSPs, SSPs, DMPs, CDPs, and other AdTech platforms.
  • Drive adoption of robust MLOps frameworks, model lifecycle management, and continuous deployment pipelines.
  • Establish enterprise-grade standards for data quality, governance, security, and system performance.
  • Collaborate with engineering leadership on cloud architecture strategy (AWS/Azure/GCP).


5. Strategic Leadership & Team Development

  • Build and scale a high-performing AI organization including Data Scientists, ML Engineers, Applied Researchers, and MLOps professionals.
  • Mentor senior AI leaders and establish succession pipelines.
  • Drive a culture of experimentation, innovation, accountability, and quality.
  • Align AI initiatives with broader organizational OKRs and revenue strategy.


6. Cross-Functional & Executive Collaboration

  • Partner closely with Product, Engineering, Yield, Sales, Finance, and Operations teams to embed AI into core business workflows.
  • Translate complex analytical outputs into executive-ready business insights.
  • Engage with enterprise clients and strategic partners to showcase AI capabilities.
  • Contribute to positioning MADTECH.AI as a market-leading AI-driven marketing intelligence platform.


Qualifications & Experience

  • Master’s in Artificial Intelligence, Data Science, Computer Science, Statistics, or related field. Ph.D. preferred.
  • 12+ years of experience in Data Science/AI, with 6+ years in leadership roles managing AI teams.
  • Proven experience delivering AI-driven products in AdTech, MarTech, Media, or Digital Marketing ecosystems.
  • Strong expertise in:
  • Machine Learning & Deep Learning
  • NLP & Large Language Models
  • Advanced statistical modeling
  • Cloud-native AI architecture
  • Hands-on familiarity with Python, ML frameworks (TensorFlow, PyTorch), and distributed data systems.
  • Experience implementing MLOps best practices in production environments.


Leadership Competencies

  • Strategic and commercial orientation.
  • Strong decision-making and prioritization capability.
  • Ability to balance innovation with scalable execution.
  • Executive-level communication and stakeholder management skills.
  • High ownership mindset with measurable impact focus.


Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)

  • AI-driven revenue contribution and margin improvement.
  • Improvement in campaign ROI, eCPM, fill rates, and attribution accuracy.
  • Adoption rate of GenAI-powered features.
  • Model deployment velocity and reliability.
  • Team engagement, retention, and leadership pipeline strength.
  • AI-attributed revenue growth and contribution to new ARR.
  • Reduction in manual analytics effort and improvement in client retention through AI-enabled differentiation.


Why This Role Matters


This position will directly influence MADTECH.AI’s competitive advantage by embedding intelligence into every layer of marketing and media decision-making. The Director - AI will shape the future of AI-led marketing optimization and drive sustainable growth through innovation.

items.description: About PhonePe Limited:Headquartered in India, its flagship product, the PhonePe digital payments app, was launched in Aug 2016. items.descriptionHtml:
About PhonePe Limited:

Headquartered in India, its flagship product, the PhonePe digital payments app, was launched in Aug 2016. As of April 2025, PhonePe has over 60 Crore (600 Million) registered users and a digital payments acceptance network spread across over 4 Crore (40+ million) merchants. PhonePe also processes over 33 Crore (330+ Million) transactions daily with an Annualized Total Payment Value (TPV) of over INR 150 lakh crore.

PhonePe’s portfolio of businesses includes the distribution of financial products (Insurance, Lending, and Wealth) as well as new consumer tech businesses (Pincode - hyperlocal e-commerce and Indus AppStore Localized App Store for the Android ecosystem) in India, which are aligned with the company’s vision to offer every Indian an equal opportunity to accelerate their progress by unlocking the flow of money and access to services.

Culture:

At PhonePe, we go the extra mile to make sure you can bring your best self to work, Everyday!. And that starts with creating the right environment for you. We empower people and trust them to do the right thing. Here, you own your work from start to finish, right from day one. PhonePe-rs solve complex problems and execute quickly; often building frameworks from scratch. If you’re excited by the idea of building platforms that touch millions, ideating with some of the best minds in the country and executing on your dreams with purpose and speed, join us!

The Mandate

PhonePe Group is building one of India’s first fully AI-native marketing organizations. We are not just looking for someone to experiment with AI. We want a leader who will change how our team of over 100 marketers thinks, works, and delivers. The AI Creative Head is the architect of this transformation. You will own the strategy, infrastructure, and culture change needed to empower every marketer at PhonePe. You will build a team of AI specialists, create the playbook, and set the metrics. You will be accountable for measurable improvements in marketing speed, creative quality, and operational efficiency. This is a strategic leadership role, not just a hands-on position. You will report directly to the HOD and help design the future of our marketing.

Core Competencies

  • Visionary Curiosity: You anticipate AI trends rather than just tracking them. You have been building with AI tools since the early days. You can see where the industry will be in a year and prepare the organization to get there first.
  • Focus on Architecture: You have moved beyond simple prototyping. You think in terms of scalable workflows, governance frameworks, and team structures that will last.
  • Executive Influence: You can confidently explain to senior leadership why AI needs budget, headcount, and strategic priority. You focus on business outcomes instead of just tool features.
  • Culture Engineering: You understand that new tools fail without a change in mindset. You have successfully built cultures of experimentation in the past.
  • Innovation with Accountability: You push boundaries while measuring everything. You can link every AI initiative to time saved, revenue growth, or improved quality.
  • Macro Understanding: You have a deep understanding of consumer behavior. You can spot cultural shifts and turn them into marketing strategies that connect with our diverse users.

What You Will Own

 AI Transformation Strategy & Roadmap

  • Define the annual AI adoption plan for the entire marketing organization.
  • Identify and prioritize the most impactful AI use cases based on feasibility and team readiness.
  • Build the business case for AI integration by projecting efficiency gains, resource optimization, and quality improvements.
  • Share quarterly progress and recommendations with executive leadership using clear metrics.

Building & Leading the Team

  • Hire and develop a team of AI specialists and prompt engineers to work alongside marketing squads.
  • Design the best organizational structure for the AI function.
  • Create performance frameworks and career paths for this entirely new team.

AI Infrastructure & Tooling Ecosystem

  • Manage the marketing AI stack by evaluating and integrating tools like language models, image generators, and workflow automation.
  • Build and maintain a central playbook containing prompt libraries, workflow templates, and compliance guidelines.
  • Design workflows using tools like N8N, Zapier, Make, and custom APIs to automate marketing tasks.
  • Set up quality control processes, including brand safety checks and human review for AI-generated content.

Cross-Functional Enablement & Change Management

  • Run a structured training program with onboarding, skill assessments, and ongoing learning for over 100 marketers.
  • Work closely with Product, Engineering, Data Science, and Legal teams to ensure tools are compliant and scalable.
  • Track adoption metrics closely, including active usage, completion rates, and team satisfaction.
  • Act as the internal champion for AI transformation by presenting at meetings and building excitement.

Creative & Performance Impact

  • Drive measurable improvements in creative output speed and campaign iteration.
  • Work with performance marketing leads to integrate AI into media buying and creative optimization.
  • Collaborate with brand and content teams to produce higher-quality content faster while protecting brand integrity.

Skills Required

Gen AI Mastery

  • You have built reliable, production-grade AI workflows at scale.
  • You have deep experience with language models like GPT, Claude, and Gemini.
  • You are experienced with image generation tools like Midjourney and DALL-E, and video tools like Runway.
  • You understand prompt engineering, architecture frameworks, and when to build versus buy.
  • You can quickly evaluate new AI tools and make confident decisions.

Marketing Domain Depth

  • You have 8 to 12 or more years of marketing experience across areas like performance marketing, brand strategy, or growth.
  • You have managed large-scale marketing operations with high budgets and teams of over 10 people.
  • You understand the full marketing stack, including paid media, CRM platforms, analytics, and creative production.
  • Experience in fintech or high-growth consumer apps is highly preferred.

Leadership & Stakeholder Management

  • You have a proven track record of building teams in fast-moving environments.
  • You can communicate clearly and effectively with executives and the board.
  • You are an expert in change management and driving the adoption of new processes.
  • You collaborate seamlessly with technical and legal teams without needing close supervision.

Mindset to Succeed

  • Total Ownership: You take responsibility for the outcome of AI transformation across the entire marketing organization. If a team is not adopting AI, you step in to help them.
  • Comfort with Ambiguity: You thrive in a constantly changing landscape where there is no existing playbook. You are energized by building processes from scratch. You make strong decisions with incomplete information and adjust quickly.
  • Systems Thinking: You focus on building repeatable systems and frameworks that solve problems across the entire organization.

Ideal Candidate Profile

  • 8 to 12 or more years in marketing, with at least 2 to 3 years leading teams of 5 or more.
  • Hands-on experience building AI workflows and automation systems.
  • Proven success in driving process or culture changes across an organization of over 100 people.
  • A strong builder's mindset.
  • A background in fintech, consumer tech, or high-growth digital businesses.
  • Public speaking experience or published thought leadership on AI in marketing is a bonus.

Why This Role Matters

This is not just an innovation experiment. PhonePe believes AI-native marketing will be a major competitive advantage over the next three years. The AI Creative Head will be the leader who makes this happen. You will have the resources, budget, and executive support to change how one of India's largest consumer tech companies operates. If you want to build a new function from the ground up with real ambition, this is the opportunity.

PhonePe Full Time Employee Benefits (Not applicable for Intern or Contract Roles)

  • Insurance Benefits - Medical Insurance, Critical Illness Insurance, Accidental Insurance, Life Insurance
  • Wellness Program - Employee Assistance Program, Onsite Medical Center, Emergency Support System
  • Parental Support - Maternity Benefit, Paternity Benefit Program, Adoption Assistance Program, Day-care Support Program
  • Mobility Benefits - Relocation benefits, Transfer Support Policy, Travel Policy
  • Retirement Benefits - Employee PF Contribution, Flexible PF Contribution, Gratuity, NPS, Leave Encashment
  • Other Benefits - Higher Education Assistance, Car Lease, Salary Advance Policy

Our inclusive culture promotes individual expression, creativity, innovation, and achievement and in turn helps us better understand and serve our customers. We see ourselves as a place for intellectual curiosity, ideas and debates, where diverse perspectives lead to deeper understanding and better quality results. PhonePe is an equal opportunity employer and is committed to treating all its employees and job applicants equally; regardless of gender, sexual preference, religion, race, color or disability. If you have a disability or special need that requires assistance or reasonable accommodation, during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please fill out this form.

Read more about PhonePe on our blog.

items.descriptionHtml:
We are seeking an experienced Director of AI to lead the development and deployment of AI applications across as an organization. The role augments defining strategic priorities, manages a team of AI, machine learning, and data science specialists, and ensures AI supports long-term business goals. Core responsibilities include overseeing research and experimentation, aligning AI use cases with product and commercial strategy, guiding model governance, and reporting to executive stakeholders. The profile also needs to work across engineering, legal, and operations to manage risk and compliance.

Responsibilities

  • The head of AI leads the strategy, development, and governance of AI systems across the business. Responsibilities typically include:
  • Setting vision and roadmap for AI use cases and platform capabilities.
  • Managing teams across research, AI engineering, and AI/MLOps functions.
  • Overseeing deployment of AI models into production environments.
  • Aligning AI initiatives with product and business goals.
  • Ensuring ethical and compliant use of AI and data.
  • Evaluating and selecting AI tooling, vendors, and infrastructure.
  • Driving innovation through partnerships, pilots, and emerging tech.
  • Reporting AI outcomes and ROI to executive leadership.
  • Leading recruitment and capability development across AI functions.
  • Collaborating with stakeholders across product, data, legal, and engineering teams.

Requirements

  • Bachelor's/Master's Degree in Computer Science or a related field from one of the premier institutes in India/abroad. IIT/IIIT/ISI/RECs would be preferred.
  • 10-15 years of experience with 5+ years in AI technical and solution architecture.
  • Strong expertise in ML, deep learning, and generative AI is a must.
  • Deep expertise in integrating and training Large Language Models (LLMs), Large Multimodal Models (LMMs), and Small Language Models (SLMs).
  • Proven experience deploying enterprise-scale AgenXc AI systems, including Model Context Protocol (MCP) client-host architecture.
  • Experience in agency calling and multimodal agents, including vernacular support for Indian languages, would be an added plus.
  • In-depth understanding of AI governance and ethics.
  • Strong understanding of prompt engineering, including emotional nuance, character consistency, and cinematic motion control for persona mapping/cloning solutions.
  • Experience in training or fine-tuning AI/ML models for real estate construction and BIM design solutions.
  • Hands-on experience with AI agency calling, including vernacular and English language support.
  • Clear understanding of AI limitations and effective workarounds to avoid uncanny or inconsistent results to avoid hallucinations.
  • Experience performing AI-specific quality control, including fixing gesture issues, continuity problems, unnatural movements, and audio-visual mismatches.
  • Ability to balance creative vision with technical constraints in fast-evolving AI environments.
  • Knowledgeable in using CI/CD tools and DevOps technologies like Docker, Kubernetes, and microservices with cloud environments like AWS/Azure/GCP.
  • Exposure to real estate technology platforms, including construction management, is preferred.
  • Broad operational knowledge of application servers, databases, load balancers, and other infrastructure components required to deploy web applications in a highly available and scalable environment.
  • Acquainted with multiple SQL, NoSQL, Vector, and Graph database technologies such as MongoDB, Couchbase, Cassandra, Redis, Neo4J, Oracle, SQL Server, Qdrant, Milvus, Pinecone, ChromaDB, etc.
  • A strong foundation in developing AI applications and products supporting desktop, mobile, and tablet is a must.
  • Adept at using design tools such as Diagrams.net, Lucidchart, PlantUML, Mermaid etc.

items.descriptionHtml:
Technology - ADAPT (AI, Data, and Platform Technologies) - Director, Engineering

Gurugram, India


COMPANY OVERVIEW


KKR & Co. Inc., a leading global investment firm, offers alternative asset management, capital markets, and insurance solutions. KKR is committed to generating attractive investment returns through a disciplined approach, employing world-class talent, and supporting growth in portfolio companies and communities. KKR sponsors investment funds in private equity, credit, and real assets, and partners with hedge fund managers. Its insurance subsidiaries offer products under The Global Atlantic Financial Group.


TEAM OVERVIEW


KKR's Gurugram office provides best-in-class business operations services and solutions to our internal stakeholders and clients, drives organization-wide process efficiency and transformation, and reflects KKR's global culture and values of teamwork and innovation. The office contains multifunctional business capabilities and is integral in furthering the growth and transformation of KKR. The office was established with an initial concentration of finance, operations, and technology personnel, followed by the expansion of additional functions and capabilities. KKR’s creation of a Gurugram office builds upon the firm's momentum in India and bolsters its existing presence in Mumbai.

The ADAPT (AI, Data, and Platform Technologies) Engineering team is integral to KKR's technological strategy, architecting, and supporting the firm's foundational data and AI capabilities. This team is recognized as a key enabler for global scale and business transformation, driving excellence by evolving technology into robust, platform-based solutions that enhance agility and deliver material business impact.


POSITION SUMMARY


As Director of Engineering, you will be a key member of KKR’s global technology leadership team, reporting to a Managing Director. In this role, you will lead the day-to-day operations and wellbeing of the local engineering team, while playing a critical part in scaling and strengthening KKR’s long-term engineering capabilities in India.

In this role, you will design, build, and maintain scalable data pipelines and platforms that support analytics, reporting, and advanced data science use cases. You will work closely with data analysts, data scientists, and engineering teams to ensure data is reliable, accessible, and production-ready. This role requires a visible, hands-on leader in Gurugram who can support the team locally and build strong partnerships across the organization.

You will also define the technical blueprint for how KKR structures, stores, and uses data to power its AI and platform capabilities, ensuring data integrity, performance, and accessibility for critical firmwide services.


KEY RESPONSIBILITIES


  • Define the target-state architecture for investments data, including scalable data models, ingestion frameworks, data pipelines, real-time processing, and analytics-ready platforms that support front-office, finance, risk, operations, and executive reporting needs.
  • Partner with senior leaders across Investments, Technology, Finance, Operations, Risk, Enterprise, Insurance, and Data Governance to align data engineering initiatives with business strategy, platform modernization goals, and regulatory or control requirements.
  • Lead the modernization of legacy data environments and reporting processes by introducing scalable, cloud-aligned, and well-governed engineering patterns that improve the quality, transparency, timeliness, and reusability of investment data.
  • Drive the development of enterprise-grade investment data products and semantic models that enable consistent reporting, analytics, and decision-making across asset classes and investment strategies.
  • Build, lead, and develop a high-performing team of data engineers and technical leads, fostering strong execution, talent development, engineering discipline, and a culture of accountability and innovation.
  • Establish and enforce best practices for data architecture, software engineering, testing, observability, release management, and platform governance across the Investments Data Engineering organization.
  • Manage a portfolio of strategic initiatives, balancing long-term platform transformation with near-term business priorities, while ensuring effective prioritization, stakeholder communication, and measurable outcomes.
  • Build and manage data ingestion frameworks across multiple structured and unstructured data sources.


QUALIFICATIONS


  • Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Information Systems, or a related field; advanced degree preferred.
  • 16+ years of experience in data engineering, data architecture, or related technology roles, including significant experience leading teams and delivering large-scale enterprise data platforms.
  • Deep domain expertise in investment management, asset management, insurance investments, private markets, or other complex financial services environments, with a strong understanding of investment data and reporting requirements.
  • Proven track record of leading enterprise data modernization programs, including data warehouse transformation, pipeline re-architecture, cloud migration, and operating model improvement. Experience with platforms such as Snowflake, BigQuery, Redshift, or Databricks is preferred.
  • Strong experience designing and scaling investment data models, ETL/ELT pipelines, and analytics platforms that support complex business processes, multi-asset reporting, and cross-functional use cases.
  • Expertise in modern data engineering and platform technologies, including SQL, Python, cloud-based data ecosystems, orchestration tools, and warehouse or lakehouse architectures.
  • Knowledge of streaming technologies such as Kafka and Kinesis.
  • Experience with cloud platforms such as AWS, Azure, or GCP.
  • Strong understanding of data governance, controls, lineage, security, and auditability requirements within regulated or highly controlled environments.
  • Experience leading managers, senior engineers, and cross-functional teams, with a demonstrated ability to influence senior stakeholders and drive alignment across business and technology organizations.
  • Excellent communication skills and executive presence, with the ability to translate complex technical concepts into business value and strategic outcomes.
  • Demonstrated ability to lead large, high-visibility transformation efforts, operate effectively in ambiguity, and deliver results across multiple concurrent priorities.

items.descriptionHtml:
Head – AI Consulting & Solutions -Sales

Rakuten India Enterprise Private Ltd. |Bangalore


1. Rakuten & Rakuten India — At a Glance

Rakuten Group is a Tokyo-headquartered global internet conglomerate (est. 1997) with ~32,000+ employees across 30+ countries, and ~50+ digital-first consumer tech businesses spanning across e-commerce, fintech, telecom, digital content, communications, and sports. Key brands include Rakuten Ichiba, Rakuten Mobile, Rakuten Bank, Rakuten Card, Rakuten Securities, Rakuten Insurance, Viber, Viki, and Kobo. The Group is listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange, with FY2025 revenues of ~USD 16 Bn.

Rakuten India (Bengaluru, est. 2012) is Rakuten Group's largest R&D centre outside Japan – a 2,000+ person engineering and innovation hub that co-creates global products and platforms across product engineering, AI & Data, platform engineering, and UX. It is not a captive development shop; it is a genuine technology powerhouse with a polyglot, English-first culture where high-calibre leaders come to build at scale.

2. Rakuten AI Consulting & Solutions (R-AICS) — The Business

Incubated in November 2024, Rakuten AI Consulting & Solutions (R-AICS) is a client-facing AI advisory and delivery business built inside Rakuten India. It has a dual mandate:

  • External Revenue Engine: Deliver AI consulting and end-to-end AI solutions to enterprise clients across industries, leveraging Rakuten India's AI/ML engineering depth and the Rakuten brand.
  • Internal AI Partner: Collaborate with Rakuten India's AI & Data Division to accelerate AI use-case identification, solutioning, and deployment for enterprise clients; and close the feedback loop

R-AICS occupies a differentiated market position at the intersection of Strategy Advisory Depth × AI Engineering Execution × Global Enterprise Perspective – enabling engagements from business problem framing to production AI deployment. The team is building proprietary solution accelerators and reusable frameworks to establish Rakuten as a credible AI consulting brand in target markets.

Current focus areas: Generative AI / LLM applications, conversational AI, intelligent automation and agentic AI, AI-driven analytics and personalization, AI strategy and maturity assessments, and Responsible AI governance.

Through 2025, the initial incubation team has successfully validated the market opportunity and Rakuten’s sales and delivery playbook, with successful delivery of first 2 external AI Consulting & Solutions projects, and building an initial pipeline of ~10+ leads. In the first 2 external AI projects, solutions have been built and successfully delivered for clients in the following areas:

  1. AI led transformation of sales and customer support contact centres – agentic AI platform for handling end-to-end conversations in 6 Indian languages, and creating rich lead context and scoring for downstream follow up actions by digital marketing and human sales teams
  2. AI platform for healthcare physical records digitization – end-to-end platform for annotation and review of physical records and digitized data for integrating into the EMR systems.
  3. AI for IoT ecosystem – multiple solutions at the intersection of data sciences and AI for customer profiling, demand forecasting, predictive maintenance forecasting, and an AI business analyst layer on top of these solutions.


The Role


Role Type: External, client-facing Revenue Engine Leadership| P&L ownership

Location: Bengaluru (domestic and international client travel as required)

This is a founding leadership role — not a management position in a mature business. The incumbent owns the full build-and-scale agenda of R-AICS: from pipeline and revenue to team, IP, and Rakuten India's AI brand in the market. It requires executive gravitas to engage C-suite clients, consulting rigour to structure complex AI transformation engagements, and sufficient technical fluency to credibly direct AI solution architecture and delivery.

Key Responsibilities

  • Business Development & Revenue: Develop and execute the GTM strategy; own the full sales pipeline from lead generation to contract closure; personally lead high-value CxO-level client pursuits; meet signed-project and revenue milestones agreed
  • Client Engagement: Serve as executive sponsor for key accounts; own the end-to-end client lifecycle (discovery → solutioning → delivery → expansion); drive client satisfaction and account growth.
  • Solution Design & AI Advisory: Guide end-to-end AI solution design (strategy, architecture, data, model, deployment) in partnership with the Pre-Sales Specialist and Rakuten India's AI & Data Division; lead AI strategy assessments and transformation roadmaps for clients.
  • Delivery Oversight: Establish delivery standards and governance frameworks; provide senior oversight to the Delivery Lead; ensure on-time, in-scope, high-quality execution across the project portfolio.
  • Team & Capability Building: Hire and develop a high-performing team of AI consultants, solutions architects, and delivery professionals; build reusable solution assets, IP, and a scalable delivery methodology.
  • Internal AI Collaboration: Partner with Rakuten India's AI & Data Division on internal AI use-cases; act as a bridge between commercial client insights and Rakuten's internal AI platform teams.



4. Candidate Profile

Qualifications: Undergraduate

B.E. / B.Tech in Computer Science, Electronics, or related discipline from a reputed institution (mandatory)

Postgraduate

MBA from a premier institution — IIMs (A/B/C/L/I/K), ISB, MDI, IIT SoM, XLRI or equivalent global school (mandatory)

Certifications

AI/ML, cloud platforms, or Design Thinking certifications are a plus; not mandatory

Experience |15–20+ Years Total

  • Consulting Pedigree (Essential): 5–8+ years at a top-tier firms — Strong track record across both Strategy Advisory and Transformation engagements at CxO level.
  • Digital / AI Transformation (Strong Plus): Demonstrated experience on Digital Transformation programs — AI strategy, data platform buildouts, intelligent automation, or large-scale technology-led business transformation. Exposure to GenAI, LLMs, or enterprise AI deployments.
  • Commercial / BD Ownership (Essential): Prior ownership or material contribution to sales pursuits, proposal development, and client acquisition. P&L or practice-building experience is highly desirable.
  • Sector Context (Preferred): E-Commerce, FinTech, Retail, BFSI, or Technology; India market + global (US/APAC/Europe) client exposure is advantageous.


Competency Framework

Strategic Thinking

Define market opportunity, GTM strategy, and multi-horizon growth plans for a nascent consulting business

Executive Presence

Board-level communication; ability to engage and influence CxO audiences with clarity and conviction

Consulting Craft

Structured problem-solving, hypothesis-driven analysis, story lining, and proposal writing to top-tier standards

AI Fluency

Working knowledge of AI/ML landscape, LLMs, GenAI, and enterprise AI deployment — sufficient to direct technical teams and evaluate solution quality

Business Development

Pipeline management, enterprise deal pursuit, and commercial negotiation

Delivery Governance

Portfolio-level oversight; ability to balance quality, timeline, and client expectations across multi-workstream engagements

Team Leadership

Track record of building and scaling consulting / technology teams; strong coaching orientation

Entrepreneurial Drive

Comfort with ambiguity; start-up energy with bias for action and outcome accountability



5. Why Join

  • Build a 0→1 Business: A rare opportunity to shape and lead a new, high-visibility business unit from the ground up — with the credibility and backing of a globally recognised consumer-tech business conglomerate, and the energy of a startup.
  • Unmatched Technical Depth: Deploy 2,500+ world-class engineers and AI/data scientists at Rakuten India on client engagements — a talent pool most consulting firms cannot match.
  • Cutting-Edge AI Work: Front-row seat to enterprise AI transformation — GenAI, agentic AI, and LLM applications at a moment when AI is reshaping every sector.
  • Startup Agility, Enterprise Scale: The best of both worlds — founding team energy with the stability, brand, infrastructure, and global reach of Rakuten Group.
  • Growth Trajectory: As R-AICS scales, significant scope for the role to evolve into a broader AI Services leadership mandate with global dimensions.
  • Competitive Package: Compensation, benefits, and ESOPs aligned with the growth trajectory of the business.


If you want to build the AI consulting business of the future — on a global platform, with world-class engineering talent

About ADA

ADA is the Data and AI Experience Company. Present in 14 markets globally, we build intelligent experiences that power enterprise growth, spanning identity and authentication, personalization, commerce, and data & AI foundations; where every touchpoint earns trust, every interaction creates value, and every decision runs on real-time intelligence, so enterprises can stay ahead and deliver measurable outcomes. Our mission is to build the world's most intelligent growth platform for every client we serve. We work with over 1,500 global brands across CPG, Retail, Telco, BFSI, and Healthcare.

Job Description: Head of AI

Role Overview

We are seeking a Head of AI to lead the design, development, and deployment of AI/ML capabilities across our core products. This role sits at the intersection of product innovation, engineering execution, and applied AI strategy, reporting directly to the CTO.

In addition to driving AI excellence within products, this role will contribute (~10% bandwidth) to the ADA’s AI strategy, helping shape high-impact AI integrations

AI Strategy & Leadership

Define and own the AI/ML vision and roadmap aligned with business and product strategy

Identify high-leverage opportunities to embed AI-driven capabilities across products

Drive adoption of modern AI paradigms (LLMs, agentic workflows, RAG, etc.)

Establish best practices for Responsible AI, evaluation, and governance

Product AI Development

Lead end-to-end development of AI/ML features across multiple products

Translate business problems into scalable AI solutions

Ensure production-grade scalability and reliability

Drive AI-first product thinking across teams

Architecture & Technical Excellence

Define scalable architecture for ML pipelines and LLM orchestration

Establish standards for experimentation, monitoring, and data pipelines

Guide build vs buy decisions across AI stack

Implement robust evaluation and observability frameworks

Team Building & Leadership

Build and lead a high-performing team of ML Engineers, Applied Scientists, and AI Engineers

Mentor teams on advanced AI techniques and system design

Foster a culture of innovation, ownership, and experimentation

Consulting / Solutions Contribution (~10%)

Support consulting engagements with AI expertise

Review solution architectures and proposals

Participate in key client discussions as an AI SME

Translate internal capabilities into external AI solutions

Cross-Functional Collaboration

Work closely with CTO, Product, Engineering, and Business stakeholders

Act as the AI thought leader across the organization

Required Qualifications

10–15+ years of experience in AI/ML or Applied AI Engineering

Experience building and deploying AI/ML systems in production

Strong expertise in ML, LLMs, or agentic systems

Proven leadership in cross-functional teams

Strong system design and architectural skills

Preferred Qualifications

Experience building AI-powered products

Familiarity with agentic frameworks and LLM evaluation systems

Exposure to domains like e-commerce, operations, or conversational AI

Key Traits

Product-first mindset

Strong ownership and execution bias

Ability to operate across strategy and execution

Clear communication skills

Pragmatic decision-making

Success Metrics

Impact of AI features on product KPIs

Speed and quality of AI deployments

Scalability and robustness of AI systems

Consulting impact and client satisfaction

Growth and strength of AI team

Reporting Structure

Reports to: Chief Technology Officer (CTO)

Collaborates with Product, Engineering, and Consulting teams

items.title: Director, Data & AI
items.description: Opportunity OverviewWe are seeking a Director of Data & AI to join our product development team. In this role, you will lead world-class analytics, data science, and machine learning teams to enable clinical insights and precision AI. items.descriptionHtml:
Opportunity Overview

We are seeking a Director of Data & AI to join our product development team. In this role, you will lead world-class analytics, data science, and machine learning teams to enable clinical insights and precision AI. You’ll partner closely with product, design, and software engineering to drive the research and development of data-centric solutions.

As a member of the leadership team, you’ll work closely with business and AI partners across the globe to co-create solutions and drive the seamless execution of critical initiatives. You’ll have the opportunity to apply deep analytics and AI expertise to deliver products that transform healthcare. You’ll foster a culture of innovation, champion Cohere’s values and leadership principle, and guide a team of engineers, analysts, and scientists to leverage complex healthcare data and methodologies in a fast-paced, rapidly-evolving landscape answering critical business and clinical questions. By combining modern analytic tools, methodologies, and AI technologies to meet challenging and open-ended business requests, this crucial role molds our analysis and builds data-driven analytics products.

What You’ll Do

  • Recruit and build high-caliber machine learning, data science, and business intelligence development team
  • Leadership and Management:
    • Lead and manage engineering teams, including recruitment, mentorship, and performance evaluation.
    • Nurture a collaborative and innovative culture within the team and throughout the organization
    • Develop and implement strategic plans for the Data & AI department in alignment with the company’s goals
    • Ownership and accountability of key quality and delivery metrics of the Data & AI solutions, including time to value, model accuracy, etc.
  • Collaboration and Communication
    • Partner with Cohere Health’s US-based Data & AI team and assure consistent technical strategy, aligned roadmaps, and value-centric delivery approaches.
    • Collaborate with cross-functional product, clinical, and engineering partners to understand their needs, recommend solution approaches, and develop execution strategies
  • Innovation and Delivery
    • Oversee the design, development, and deployment of analytic and AI solution developments
    • Identify opportunities for technological advancements, applicable technical patterns, and innovation.
    • Direct an innovation pipeline from experimentations, to development, to maturation
    • Provide technical guidance, managing timeline, and ensuring quality and scalability of deliverables
    • Foster a data-driven decision-making culture and prioritize responsible AI
What You’ll Need

Must-haves

  • 8+ years of management experience hiring and developing data-centric development teams
  • 12+ years of experience in data science and machine learning
  • Advanced degree (MS or Ph.D.) in a quantitative field Math, Engineering, Computer Science, Machine Learning
  • Proven success in growing and managing geographically distributed teams and fostering multi-functional collaborations
  • Track record of translating complex business problems into end-to-end data analytics products with a quantifiable business impact
  • Demonstrated success in maturing machine learning prototypes into scalable software
  • Experience with US managed care design and operations

Nice-to-haves

  • Strong preference for healthcare experience, specifically experience in Utilization Management, Payment Integrity, Risk Adjustment and Quality Measures
  • Hands-on experience with large-scale healthcare administrative and clinical data
  • Familiarity with healthcare body codesets, terminology and ontology
  • Prior experience in B2B enterprise SaaS startup

Ability To Commute/relocate

  • Hyderabad, Telangana*: Reliably commute or planning to relocate before starting work (Preferred)

Interview Process*:

  • Connect with Talent Acquisition
  • Meet with the Hiring Manager
  • Behavioral Interview(s)
  • Case Study
  • Interview with Senior Leadership
  • Subject to change

About Cohere Health

Cohere Health’s clinical intelligence platform delivers AI-powered solutions that streamline access to quality care by improving payer-provider collaboration, cost containment, and healthcare economics. Cohere Health works with over 660,000 providers and handles over 12 million prior authorization requests annually. Its responsible AI auto-approves up to 90% of requests for millions of health plan members.

With the acquisition of ZignaAI, we’ve further enhanced our platform by launching our Payment Integrity Suite, anchored by Cohere Validate™, an AI-driven clinical and coding validation solution that operates in near real-time. By unifying pre-service authorization data with post-service claims validation, we’re creating a transparent healthcare ecosystem that reduces waste, improves payer-provider collaboration and patient outcomes, and ensures providers are paid promptly and accurately.

Cohere Health’s innovations continue to receive industry wide recognition. We’ve been named to the 2025 Inc. 5000 list and in the Gartner® Hype Cycle™ for U.S. Healthcare Payers (2022-2025), and ranked as a Top 5 LinkedIn™ Startup for 2023 & 2024. Backed by leading investors such as Deerfield Management, Define Ventures, Flare Capital Partners, Longitude Capital, and Polaris Partners, Cohere Health drives more transparent, streamlined healthcare processes, helping patients receive faster, more appropriate care and higher-quality outcomes.

The Coherenauts, as we call ourselves, who succeed here are empathetic teammates who are candid, kind, caring, and embody our core values and principles. We believe that diverse, inclusive teams make the most impactful work. Cohere is deeply invested in ensuring that we have a supportive, growth-oriented environment that works for everyone.

We can’t wait to learn more about you and meet you at Cohere Health!

Equal Opportunity Statement

Cohere Health is an Equal Opportunity Employer. We are committed to fostering an environment of mutual respect where equal employment opportunities are available to all. To us, it’s personal.

items.descriptionHtml:
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Director, AI and Analytics Sales in India.

This role is a high-impact, quota-carrying sales leadership position focused on driving new business and expansion across AI, data, and analytics solutions. You will be responsible for owning the full sales cycle, from pipeline creation to contract execution, while engaging senior decision-makers across enterprise organizations. The position requires a strong consultative sales approach, combining deep understanding of data platforms with the ability to translate technical capabilities into measurable business value. You will actively shape go-to-market strategies, build trusted executive relationships, and influence adoption of modern AI and analytics solutions. Operating in a fast-paced, partner-driven ecosystem, you will collaborate closely with technical, marketing, and delivery teams to accelerate deal success. This is a highly strategic role for a commercially driven leader passionate about data, AI, and enterprise transformation.

Accountabilities

  • Own and deliver quarterly and annual revenue targets across AI, analytics, and data platform services.
  • Drive the full sales lifecycle, including prospecting, qualification, solution development, negotiation, and deal closure.
  • Build and manage a robust, predictable pipeline using CRM tools, ensuring accurate forecasting and reporting.
  • Develop territory and account strategies to maximize growth opportunities within target industries.
  • Lead executive-level client engagements, including discovery sessions, solution presentations, and business case development.
  • Collaborate with pre-sales and delivery teams to create technically strong and commercially compelling proposals and SOWs.
  • Partner with ecosystem vendors such as Databricks and Snowflake to generate co-sell opportunities and joint pipeline.
  • Represent the organization at industry events, conferences, and partner forums to strengthen visibility and demand generation.
  • Maintain long-term executive relationships to support account expansion and customer success continuity.

Requirements

  • 7+ years of enterprise sales experience, including at least 2+ years selling data, analytics, or cloud platform services.
  • Proven track record of consistently achieving or exceeding quota in complex, consultative sales environments.
  • Strong experience managing large, multi-stakeholder deals typically exceeding $500K+.
  • Deep familiarity with data platforms such as Databricks, Snowflake, or equivalent ecosystems.
  • Solid understanding of modern data architectures including data warehousing, lakehouse, and AI/ML use cases.
  • Strong executive presence with the ability to influence C-level stakeholders and translate technical concepts into business outcomes.
  • Experience working with consulting or professional services organizations in a quota-carrying sales role.
  • Strong knowledge of the competitive landscape, including major cloud and data providers.
  • Proficiency in CRM systems such as Salesforce and disciplined pipeline management practices.
  • Bachelor’s degree in Business, Computer Science, or related field (advanced degree preferred).

Benefits

  • Competitive compensation aligned with senior enterprise sales roles.
  • Fully remote work flexibility.
  • Opportunity to sell cutting-edge AI, analytics, and data platform solutions.
  • Strong partner ecosystem exposure with leading technology providers such as Databricks and Snowflake.
  • High-growth environment with significant revenue ownership and career advancement potential.
  • Collaborative, cross-functional culture spanning sales, engineering, and delivery teams.

How Jobgether Works

We use an AI-powered matching process to ensure your application is reviewed quickly, objectively, and fairly against the role's core requirements. Our system identifies the top-fitting candidates, and this shortlist is then shared directly with the hiring company. The final decision and next steps (interviews, assessments) are managed by their internal team.

We appreciate your interest and wish you the best!

Why Apply Through Jobgether?

Data Privacy Notice: By submitting your application, you acknowledge that Jobgether will process your personal data to evaluate your candidacy and share relevant information with the hiring employer. This processing is based on legitimate interest and pre-contractual measures under applicable data protection laws (including GDPR). You may exercise your rights (access, rectification, erasure, objection) at any time.

We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

items.descriptionHtml:
We help the world run better

At SAP, we keep it simple: you bring your best to us, and we'll bring out the best in you. We're builders touching over 20 industries and 80% of global commerce, and we need your unique talents to help shape what's next. The work is challenging – but it matters. You'll find a place where you can be yourself, prioritize your wellbeing, and truly belong. What's in it for you? Constant learning, skill growth, great benefits, and a team that wants you to grow and succeed.

Meet your team

Product, Data & Technology - Tools India is responsible for defining, designing & developing applications that support product development at SAP.

We are the team responsible for several innovative applications including:

  • Hyperspace (SAP’s official internal development platform)
  • SAP Jira (SAP’s official backlog management tool with over 100,000 end-users)
  • Lucid Capacity (simplified capacity management for development)
  • SAP Transformation Navigator (provides guidance to SAP customers on charting their path to an intelligent enterprise. Winner of the 2017 Hasso Plattner Award)
  • AI Pair Programming with GitHub Copilot

We aim for excellence in our work and prioritize developing strong professional relationships and having fun at work.

With teams in Walldorf, Palo Alto, Sofia, Paris and Bangalore, we offer an open, collaborative and international environment for continuous learning and career development!

What You'll Do

  • Define and execute our internal AI strategy and roadmap.
  • Identify, assess, and prioritize high-impact AI use cases.
  • Establish the AI operating model (intake, governance, standards & playbooks).
  • Architect and deliver flagship multi-agent platforms and autonomous workflows that improve SAP’s internal productivity tools.
  • Lead strategic evaluation, vendor selection, and long-term partnerships for third-party foundation models, cloud AI services, and open-source ecosystem.
  • Technically lead and mentor a team of AI Experts and AI Developers while maintaining strong hands-on coding and prototyping.
  • Drive SAP’s thought leadership in enterprise Agentic AI through patents, open-source contributions, conference talks, and publications.
  • Drive responsible AI governance (policies, risk management, privacy, security and audit readiness).
  • Drive AI change management and enablement.

What You Bring

  • Bachelor’s or Master's degree in Computer Science or a related field.
  • Over 15 years of IT experience in technology, product and data roles.
  • Over 5 years of experience in Artificial Intelligence.

Must Have Skills

  • Strong AI foundations incl. GenAI, LLM concepts (transformers, prompting, RAG, function-calling, fine-tuning, adapters).
  • Enterprise Architecture for AI: APIs, Microservices, Security & Integration.
  • Agentic AI concepts and protocols (Model Context Protocol, Agent-to-Agent protocol, Agent Communication Protocol)
  • Distributed Computing Systems for Big Data engineering such as Databricks (PySpark/Scala).
  • Strategic planning and portfolio management (including business case development, financial modeling, efficiency gains, total cost of ownership et al).
  • Executive communication and influence: Clear and concise writing for stakeholder communication (strategy papers, decision memos et al).

Nice To Have Skills

  • Strong programming skills in Python.
  • Machine Learning frameworks (e.g., TensorFlow, PyTorch, scikit-learn).
  • Advanced prompting, fine-tuning, Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) and evaluations.
  • Expertise in multi-agent systems using state-of-the-art frameworks (LangGraph, AutoGen, CrewAI, LlamaIndex, Semantic Kernel, DSPy)
  • DevOps and MLOps practices.

Bring out your best

SAP innovations help more than four hundred thousand customers worldwide work together more efficiently and use business insight more effectively. Originally known for leadership in enterprise resource planning (ERP) software, SAP has evolved to become a market leader in end-to-end business application software and related services for database, analytics, intelligent technologies, and experience management. As a cloud company with two hundred million users and more than one hundred thousand employees worldwide, we are purpose-driven and future-focused, with a highly collaborative team ethic and commitment to personal development. Whether connecting global industries, people, or platforms, we help ensure every challenge gets the solution it deserves. At SAP, you can bring out your best.

We win with inclusion

SAP’s culture of inclusion, focus on health and well-being, and flexible working models help ensure that everyone – regardless of background – feels included and can run at their best. At SAP, we believe we are made stronger by the unique capabilities and qualities that each person brings to our company, and we invest in our employees to inspire confidence and help everyone realize their full potential. We ultimately believe in unleashing all talent and creating a better world.

SAP is committed to the values of Equal Employment Opportunity and provides accessibility accommodations to applicants with physical and/or mental disabilities. If you are interested in applying for employment with SAP and are in need of accommodation or special assistance to navigate our website or to complete your application, please send an e-mail with your request to Recruiting Operations Team: Careers@sap.com.

For SAP employees: Only permanent roles are eligible for the SAP Employee Referral Program, according to the eligibility rules set in the SAP Referral Policy. Specific conditions may apply for roles in Vocational Training.

Qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to their age, race, religion, national origin, ethnicity, gender (including pregnancy, childbirth, et al), sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, protected veteran status, or disability, in compliance with applicable federal, state, and local legal requirements.

Successful candidates might be required to undergo a background verification with an external vendor.

We are ethical and compliant

Our leadership credo: Do what’s right. Make SAP better for generations to come. We believe that great leadership extends far beyond the mere pursuit of business goals. We value and foster leadership that is driven with purpose and integrity. Our leaders are role models who uphold SAP’s values and shape SAP’s culture of integrity, by demonstrating and championing ethical and compliant behavior towards all stakeholders.

AI Usage in the Recruitment Process

For information on the responsible use of AI in our recruitment process, please refer to our Guidelines for Ethical Usage of AI in the Recruiting Process.

Please note that any violation of these guidelines may result in disqualification from the hiring process.

items.descriptionHtml:
About ADA

ADA is the Data and AI Experience Company. Present in 14 markets globally, we build intelligent experiences that power enterprise growth, spanning identity and authentication, personalization, commerce, and data & AI foundations; where every touchpoint earns trust, every interaction creates value, and every decision runs on real-time intelligence, so enterprises can stay ahead and deliver measurable outcomes. Our mission is to build the world's most intelligent growth platform for every client we serve. We work with over 1,500 global brands across CPG, Retail, Telco, BFSI, and Healthcare.

Job Description: Head of AI

Role Overview

We are seeking a Head of AI to lead the design, development, and deployment of AI/ML capabilities across our core products. This role sits at the intersection of product innovation, engineering execution, and applied AI strategy, reporting directly to the CTO.

In addition to driving AI excellence within products, this role will contribute (~10% bandwidth) to the ADA’s AI strategy, helping shape high-impact AI integrations

AI Strategy & Leadership

Define and own the AI/ML vision and roadmap aligned with business and product strategy

Identify high-leverage opportunities to embed AI-driven capabilities across products

Drive adoption of modern AI paradigms (LLMs, agentic workflows, RAG, etc.)

Establish best practices for Responsible AI, evaluation, and governance

Product AI Development

Lead end-to-end development of AI/ML features across multiple products

Translate business problems into scalable AI solutions

Ensure production-grade scalability and reliability

Drive AI-first product thinking across teams

Architecture & Technical Excellence

Define scalable architecture for ML pipelines and LLM orchestration

Establish standards for experimentation, monitoring, and data pipelines

Guide build vs buy decisions across AI stack

Implement robust evaluation and observability frameworks

Team Building & Leadership

Build and lead a high-performing team of ML Engineers, Applied Scientists, and AI Engineers

Mentor teams on advanced AI techniques and system design

Foster a culture of innovation, ownership, and experimentation

Consulting / Solutions Contribution (~10%)

Support consulting engagements with AI expertise

Review solution architectures and proposals

Participate in key client discussions as an AI SME

Translate internal capabilities into external AI solutions

Cross-Functional Collaboration

Work closely with CTO, Product, Engineering, and Business stakeholders

Act as the AI thought leader across the organization

Required Qualifications

10–15+ years of experience in AI/ML or Applied AI Engineering

Experience building and deploying AI/ML systems in production

Strong expertise in ML, LLMs, or agentic systems

Proven leadership in cross-functional teams

Strong system design and architectural skills

Preferred Qualifications

Experience building AI-powered products

Familiarity with agentic frameworks and LLM evaluation systems

Exposure to domains like e-commerce, operations, or conversational AI

Key Traits

Product-first mindset

Strong ownership and execution bias

Ability to operate across strategy and execution

Clear communication skills

Pragmatic decision-making

Success Metrics

Impact of AI features on product KPIs

Speed and quality of AI deployments

Scalability and robustness of AI systems

Consulting impact and client satisfaction

Growth and strength of AI team

Reporting Structure

Reports to: Chief Technology Officer (CTO)

Collaborates with Product, Engineering, and Consulting teams

items.descriptionHtml:
We are seeking an experienced Director of AI to lead the development and deployment of AI applications across as an organization. The role augments defining strategic priorities, manages a team of AI, machine learning, and data science specialists, and ensures AI supports long-term business goals. Core responsibilities include overseeing research and experimentation, aligning AI use cases with product and commercial strategy, guiding model governance, and reporting to executive stakeholders. The profile also needs to work across engineering, legal, and operations to manage risk and compliance.

Responsibilities

  • The head of AI leads the strategy, development, and governance of AI systems across the business. Responsibilities typically include:
  • Setting vision and roadmap for AI use cases and platform capabilities.
  • Managing teams across research, AI engineering, and AI/MLOps functions.
  • Overseeing deployment of AI models into production environments.
  • Aligning AI initiatives with product and business goals.
  • Ensuring ethical and compliant use of AI and data.
  • Evaluating and selecting AI tooling, vendors, and infrastructure.
  • Driving innovation through partnerships, pilots, and emerging tech.
  • Reporting AI outcomes and ROI to executive leadership.
  • Leading recruitment and capability development across AI functions.
  • Collaborating with stakeholders across product, data, legal, and engineering teams.

Requirements

  • Bachelor's/Master's Degree in Computer Science or a related field from one of the premier institutes in India/abroad. IIT/IIIT/ISI/RECs would be preferred.
  • 10-15 years of experience with 5+ years in AI technical and solution architecture.
  • Strong expertise in ML, deep learning, and generative AI is a must.
  • Deep expertise in integrating and training Large Language Models (LLMs), Large Multimodal Models (LMMs), and Small Language Models (SLMs).
  • Proven experience deploying enterprise-scale AgenXc AI systems, including Model Context Protocol (MCP) client-host architecture.
  • Experience in agency calling and multimodal agents, including vernacular support for Indian languages, would be an added plus.
  • In-depth understanding of AI governance and ethics.
  • Strong understanding of prompt engineering, including emotional nuance, character consistency, and cinematic motion control for persona mapping/cloning solutions.
  • Experience in training or fine-tuning AI/ML models for real estate construction and BIM design solutions.
  • Hands-on experience with AI agency calling, including vernacular and English language support.
  • Clear understanding of AI limitations and effective workarounds to avoid uncanny or inconsistent results to avoid hallucinations.
  • Experience performing AI-specific quality control, including fixing gesture issues, continuity problems, unnatural movements, and audio-visual mismatches.
  • Ability to balance creative vision with technical constraints in fast-evolving AI environments.
  • Knowledgeable in using CI/CD tools and DevOps technologies like Docker, Kubernetes, and microservices with cloud environments like AWS/Azure/GCP.
  • Exposure to real estate technology platforms, including construction management, is preferred.
  • Broad operational knowledge of application servers, databases, load balancers, and other infrastructure components required to deploy web applications in a highly available and scalable environment.
  • Acquainted with multiple SQL, NoSQL, Vector, and Graph database technologies such as MongoDB, Couchbase, Cassandra, Redis, Neo4J, Oracle, SQL Server, Qdrant, Milvus, Pinecone, ChromaDB, etc.
  • A strong foundation in developing AI applications and products supporting desktop, mobile, and tablet is a must.
  • Adept at using design tools such as Diagrams.net, Lucidchart, PlantUML, Mermaid etc.

items.descriptionHtml:
Role Overview

At Kroll, our purpose is to bring clarity to complexity. As Director of Artificial Intelligence, you will shape and accelerate Kroll’s enterprise AI journey building the foundation for scalable, responsible, and business-aligned AI capabilities.

You will partner across Kroll’s business lines to translate emerging AI technologies into measurable business and client outcomes. This role will be a critical participant in defining and operationalizing Kroll’s AI strategy and establishing technical standards and driving innovation that enhances insight and efficiency.

Key Responsibilities

Strategic Technical Leadership

  • Collaborate on defining and executing Kroll’s AI Technology vision, strategy, and roadmap to deliver measurable business and client value, in coordination with internal stakeholders across the business
  • Advise on AI trends, emerging technologies, and market dynamics partnering with AI business champion
  • Continuously evaluate new AI tools, models, and vendors for strategic fit, scalability, and ROI potential in partnership with business champions and AI leader.
  • Act as the champion responsible for ethical AI and delivery the reflects high integrity.

Architecture and Governance

  • Define architectural principles and operating standards for scalable, secure, and ethical AI deployment.
  • Lead the evaluation, design, and implementation of optimal cloud and on-premise architectures to support Kroll’s expanding portfolio of AI-driven internal and client solutions.
  • Implement model lifecycle management practices from experimentation to monitoring and auditability.
  • Collaborate with Infosec, Legal, Risk, Compliance, and Privacy to establish enterprise-wide AI governance for transparency, accountability, and regulatory compliance.
  • Define and review model lifecycle management practices from experimentation to monitoring and auditability.

Technology and Engineering

  • Provide recommendations and insights on AI/ML technologies, data architecture, and cloud ecosystems.
  • Guide teams in developing, deploying, and operationalizing AI models at scale, including generative AI and LLM applications.
  • Ensure alignment between research, engineering, and infrastructure teams to enable sustainable AI delivery.
  • Translate business to technical requirements for R&D efforts focused on applied AI use cases, model evaluation, and emerging capabilities.
  • Develop, implement, and manage an AI sandbox for experimentation and evaluation of new vendor and model capabilities.

Program and Delivery Management

  • Partner with the AI strategy office to prioritize, execute, and scale AI initiatives across business units.
  • Translate strategic goals into actionable programs spanning generative AI, automation, and advanced analytics
  • Develop delivery frameworks to accelerate experimentation, and productionization of AI solutions aligned to Kroll priorities.
  • Establish KPIs and reporting structures to measure adoption, value creation, and risk mitigation.

People and Capability Development

  • Build and lead a multidisciplinary AI team encompassing data science, engineering, architecture, and change management
  • Collaborate with relevant internal champions (i.e.Learning, Communications) to launch firmwide AI fluency programs and internal communities of practice to strengthen adoption and innovation.
  • Partner with HR and business leaders to embed AI literacy across all levels of the organization through best-in-class learning and enablement initiatives.
  • Foster a culture of innovation, collaboration and continuous learning aligned with Kroll’s value excellence, ambition, courage, integrity and inclusion.

External and Client Engagement

  • Represent Kroll as a thought leader in AI ethics, governance, and innovation.
  • Partner with AI leadership and business champions to co-create AI-powered solutions that strengthen insight, speed, and decision-making.
  • Cultivate strategic alliances with hyperscalers, AI labs, and ecosystem partners to accelerate innovation.

Qualifications And Experience

  • 12+ years of progressive leadership experience in data, analytics, or AI within a complex, global organization (preferably in professional or financial services).
  • Demonstrated success in developing and operationalizing enterprise implementation of AI tooling and models.
  • Deep understanding of modern AI/ML technologies, generative AI, and data architecture across cloud environments.
  • Proven ability to translate AI R&D into production-grade, value-creating capabilities.
  • Track record of program management with multi-disciplinary teams.
  • Strong understanding of AI ethics, regulatory considerations, and responsible AI practices.
  • Exceptional communication and stakeholder management skills, with the ability to bridge business and technical domains.
  • Advanced degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Data Science, or equivalent experience preferred.

Skills Required

  • Experience with LLMs (ChatGPT, Claude, CoPilot, Gemini, Llama, etc.)
  • Fine-tuning, prompt engineering, and retrieval-augmented generation (RAG)
  • Large-scale model training
  • Neural network design (CNNs, RNNs, Transformers)
  • Text classification, embeddings, sentiment analysis
  • Strong foundation in Python, plus secondary languages (Java/Scala, C++, Go, Rust, etc.)
  • API development (FastAPI, Flask)
  • Version control (Git/GitHub)
  • Unit testing, code optimization, and scalability

Key Attributes

  • Purpose-Driven AI Builder: actively use and experiment with AI tools, translating emerging capabilities into practical solutions that serve clients responsibly and with integrity
  • Strategic, Execution-Oriented Operator: ability to balance long-term vision with disciplined execution, prioritize what matters, and deliver measurable impact in fast-moving, ambiguous environments.
  • Curious Systems Thinker: desire to go beyond the news cycle to deeply understand the AI landscape, connecting business needs to technical capabilities and identifying where AI creates real advantage.
  • Collaborative Enterprise Leader: demonstrated ability to build strong, trust-based relationships across functions, levels, and geographies, leveraging diverse perspectives to drive innovation and inclusive outcomes.
  • Client-Centric & Governance-Minded: ability to balance innovation with accountability — embedding security, privacy, and governance into AI solutions to deliver high-integrity results for clients.

Why Kroll

Kroll helps clients navigate risk, unlock opportunity, and deliver trusted insights that drive confident decisions. As our Director of Artificial Intelligence, you will define how AI enhances the precision, speed, and depth of those insights.

This is a foundational role — shaping the frameworks, capabilities, and culture that make responsible AI a competitive advantage. Join us to lead with purpose, build with clarity, and deliver impact at the intersection of technology, trust, and human expertise.

  • Strategic, Execution-Oriented Operator: ability to balance long-term vision with disciplined execution, prioritize what matters, and deliver measurable impact in fast-moving, ambiguous environments.
  • Curious Systems Thinker: desire to go beyond the news cycle to deeply understand the AI landscape, connecting business needs to technical capabilities and identifying where AI creates real advantage.
  • Collaborative Enterprise Leader: demonstrated ability to build strong, trust-based relationships across functions, levels, and geographies, leveraging diverse perspectives to drive innovation and inclusive outcomes.
  • Client-Centric & Governance-Minded: ability to balance innovation with accountability — embedding security, privacy, and governance into AI solutions to deliver high-integrity results for clients.

Why Kroll

Kroll helps clients navigate risk, unlock opportunity, and deliver trusted insights that drive confident decisions. As our Director of Artificial Intelligence, you will define how AI enhances the precision, speed, and depth of those insights.

This is a foundational role — shaping the frameworks, capabilities, and culture that make responsible AI a competitive advantage. Join us to lead with purpose, build with clarity, and deliver impact at the intersection of technology, trust, and human expertise.
