items.descriptionHtml:
Role Overview

The VP of AI will lead enterprise-wide AI strategy and transformation, acting as the executive owner for AI adoption, governance, capability building, and value realization. This role is responsible for aligning AI investments with company strategy, enabling business-wide adoption, and ensuring responsible, scalable implementation of AI across the organization.chiefjobs+1


Requirements

Key Responsibilities

  • Define, communicate, and execute the company-wide AI vision, strategy, roadmap, and success metrics.
  • Prioritize the AI portfolio, balancing short-term wins with long-term platform and capability investments.
  • Partner with C-suite leaders and business heads to identify opportunities where AI can improve growth, efficiency, and customer outcomes.
  • Lead cross-functional teams spanning AI/ML, transformation, product, change management, and technical program delivery.
  • Establish AI governance structures, policies, and review mechanisms for ethics, compliance, explainability, and third-party risk.
  • Sponsor AI centers of excellence, sandbox programs, innovation labs, and enterprise AI literacy initiatives.
  • Oversee integration of AI solutions into enterprise systems, business processes, and operating models.
  • Drive organization-wide change management and workforce readiness for AI adoption.
  • Serve as the executive ambassador for AI internally and externally, including board updates, partner discussions, and industry representation.

Required Qualifications

  • 12+ years of experience in AI/ML, enterprise technology, digital transformation, or data-driven product leadership, including 5+ years in executive leadership roles.
  • Proven success scaling AI initiatives across large or matrixed organizations.
  • Strong understanding of AI/ML technologies, cloud ecosystems, enterprise architecture, and business transformation.
  • Experience building governance frameworks for responsible AI and data usage.
  • Excellent executive presence, communication, and stakeholder influence.

Preferred Qualifications

  • Advanced degree in Computer Science, Data Science, Engineering, Business Administration, or related discipline.
  • Experience briefing boards, regulators, or external partners on AI strategy and risk.
  • Experience leading enterprise change management, capability building, and AI operating model design.

Suggested skills

For either title, the strongest candidate profile usually combines these skill areas:

  • AI/ML strategy and roadmap ownership.digitalwaffle+1
  • Production-grade model deployment and lifecycle management.
  • Cross-functional leadership across product, engineering, legal, and operations.digitalwaffle+1
  • Responsible AI, compliance, and governance.digitalwaffle+1
  • Business case creation, KPI tracking, and executive reporting.

items.descriptionHtml:
Citi Wealth Management is seeking a senior technology leader to establish and lead enterprise capabilities for AI evaluation, observability, guardrails, and governance supporting Generative AI, AI agents, and machine learning systems across advisor and client platforms.

This role will define and implement enterprise frameworks that ensure AI and agent-based systems are reliable, safe, explainable, and compliant with financial services regulations.

The ideal candidate will bring deep hands-on experience building and deploying AI and agent-based solutions at enterprise scale, while providing strategic leadership to develop platforms and governance models that enable responsible and scalable AI adoption across Wealth Management.

Key Responsibilities

AI Evaluation Framework (Evals)

Lead the design and implementation of enterprise evaluation frameworks to measure performance, safety, and reliability of AI models, Generative AI systems, and AI agents.

Responsibilities include:

  • Define evaluation methodologies for LLMs, AI agents, and ML models
  • Develop benchmark datasets and automated evaluation pipelines
  • Implement testing frameworks for accuracy, hallucination detection, bias, and reasoning quality
  • Establish AI performance metrics and quality KPIs
  • Enable continuous evaluation across AI development and production pipelines

AI Observability & Monitoring

Establish enterprise observability capabilities to monitor the behavior and performance of AI systems.

Responsibilities include:

  • Build end-to-end observability frameworks for AI and agent workflows
  • Monitor model performance, response quality, latency, and drift
  • Enable traceability across prompts, models, tools, and agent decision flows
  • Implement real-time dashboards, monitoring, and alerts
  • Provide operational insights for AI reliability and performance

Guardrails & Responsible AI

Develop enterprise guardrails and governance frameworks to ensure safe and compliant AI usage.

Responsibilities include:

  • Define AI safety and governance standards
  • Implement prompt injection protection and output validation
  • Enforce PII protection and regulatory compliance controls
  • Establish human-in-the-loop workflows
  • Ensure compliance with Responsible AI and enterprise AI policies

AI Agent Governance

Define governance models for autonomous and semi-autonomous AI agents deployed across wealth management systems.

Responsibilities include:

  • Establish agent lifecycle management frameworks
  • Implement agent versioning, monitoring, and auditability
  • Define policies for agent decision boundaries and tool usage
  • Ensure agents operate within enterprise risk and compliance frameworks

Enterprise Collaboration

Partner with technology and business teams across the organization.

Responsibilities include:

  • Collaborate with AI engineering, data science, product, risk, enterprise and compliance teams
  • Align AI capabilities with wealth management strategic priorities
  • Support AI-driven platforms for advisor insights, client servicing assistants, research intelligence, and marketing personalization

Hands-on Enterprise AI Implementation

This role requires deep hands-on experience designing and deploying AI and agent systems in large-scale enterprise environments, preferably within financial services.

Candidates should demonstrate:

  • Hands-on experience deploying AI models, Generative AI applications, and AI agents in production
  • Building evaluation pipelines and testing frameworks
  • Implementing AI observability and monitoring platforms
  • Designing guardrails and safety controls for AI systems
  • Delivering enterprise AI capabilities across multiple business use cases

AI Tools & Technology Ecosystem

Hands-on experience working with modern AI frameworks, agent orchestration platforms, and foundation models.

Agent Frameworks & Orchestration

Experience with platforms such as:

Lang Chain

Lang graph

Lang Smith

ADK

LlamaIndex

AI Models

Experience evaluating and deploying models such as:

GPT, Gemini, Claude, Mistral, Llama

Required Experience

  • 15+ years of overall technology experience in AI/ML, data platforms, or enterprise technology leadership.
  • Minimum 5+ years of hands-on AI implementation experience designing and deploying AI solutions at scale within large enterprise environments, preferably in financial services.
  • Demonstrated experience implementing Generative AI, AI agent systems, and machine learning solutions in production.
  • Experience building AI evaluation frameworks, observability platforms, and AI guardrails.
  • Strong understanding of AI governance, model risk management, and regulatory compliance.
  • Proven ability to lead enterprise AI initiatives and drive adoption across multiple teams.

Leadership Expectations

  • Define enterprise standards for AI governance, safety, and reliability
  • Lead development of AI observability and evaluation platforms
  • Enable scalable adoption of AI and agent-based systems
  • Mentor and lead cross-functional AI platform teams
  • Drive innovation while maintaining strong risk and compliance controls

items.descriptionHtml:
Role

The Head of AI will be responsible for defining and executing Tata Consulting Engineers’ enterprise-wide AI strategy, driving both internal transformation and external digital business growth.

This role will lead the creation of an AI-first, agentic enterprise, embedding AI across the full value chain (sales, engineering, delivery, HR, finance, legal, and proposals), while also building a market-facing Industrial AI portfolio aligned with TCE’s Digital Twin strategy.

The role combines vision, execution, productization, and monetization, with accountability for delivering measurable business outcomes including productivity gains, faster project delivery, and new revenue streams (ARR-based AI products and platforms).


Key Responsibilities

1. Enterprise AI Transformation (Internal Focus)

  • Define and execute TCE’s roadmap to become an AI-native, agentic enterprise
  • Drive AI adoption across core business functions:
  • Engineering & design automation
  • Sales & proposal intelligence
  • Project delivery optimization
  • HR, finance, legal process automation
  • Build AI awareness and capability across the organization, including leadership alignment and workforce upskilling
  • Establish AI governance, ethics, and responsible AI frameworks
  • Lead development of enterprise AI copilots and agents to improve productivity and decision-making
  • Deliver measurable outcomes:
  • Reduction in project cycle times
  • Increased engineering efficiency
  • Improved win rates and margins


2. Industrial AI Business (External / Revenue Focus)

  • Build TCE’s Industrial AI capability as part of the Digital Business Unit
  • Define and launch AI-led offerings integrated with Digital Twin solutions
  • Create a scalable Industrial AI backbone/platform aligned with:
  • Simulation-driven design
  • Smart infrastructure
  • Asset lifecycle intelligence
  • Develop AI-powered products and solutions targeting industries such as:
  • Infrastructure & urban development
  • Energy & utilities
  • Manufacturing & industrial plants
  • Drive productization and monetization:
  • Build ARR-based AI products/platforms
  • Define pricing, packaging, and GTM strategy
  • Lead customer engagements for AI-led transformation programs


3. AI Platform & Product Leadership

  • Oversee development of TCE’s AI platform architecture
  • Data pipelines, model lifecycle, orchestration layers
  • Integration with digital twin environments
  • Guide AI Product Manager in building scalable, reusable AI products
  • Ensure alignment between:
  • Platform capabilities
  • Business use cases
  • Market needs


4. Ecosystem & Partnerships

  • Build and manage strategic partnerships with:
  • Hyperscalers and AI platforms
  • Industrial AI and simulation players
  • Startups and academia
  • Leverage partnerships to accelerate:
  • Capability building
  • Joint GTM initiatives
  • Innovation and co-development
  • Position TCE as a thought leader in Industrial AI and Digital Twin convergence


5. Innovation & Thought Leadership

  • Establish TCE as a leader in:
  • Agentic AI in engineering and infrastructure
  • AI + Digital Twin convergence
  • Drive innovation programs, PoCs, and pilots
  • Represent TCE in industry forums, client discussions, and strategic engagements


Key Focus Areas (Critical Success Priorities)

Year 1 Priorities

  • Establish AI governance, operating model, and roadmap
  • Launch 3–5 high-impact internal AI use cases (quick wins)
  • Build foundational AI platform and data readiness
  • Define and pilot Industrial AI offerings
  • Create initial AI product portfolio roadmap

Medium-Term (2–3 Years)

  • Transition TCE into a scaled AI-enabled enterprise
  • Launch commercial AI products with ARR revenue streams
  • Deep integration of AI into Digital Twin solutions
  • Build a strong AI talent and capability pipeline


Candidate Profile

Experience

  • 15+ years of experience in AI, data, or digital transformation
  • Proven track record of:
  • Scaling AI initiatives in enterprises
  • Building AI products/platforms
  • Driving business impact through AI
  • Experience in industrial sectors (EPC, infrastructure, manufacturing, energy) strongly preferred
  • Exposure to Digital Twin, simulation, or engineering systems is a strong advantage


Technical & Functional Expertise

  • Strong understanding of:
  • AI/ML, GenAI, and Agentic AI architectures
  • Enterprise AI platforms and MLOps
  • Data strategy and governance
  • Experience in building:
  • AI-driven products
  • Scalable platforms
  • Enterprise-wide AI adoption frameworks


Leadership & Behavioral Competencies

  • Strategic thinker with execution rigor
  • Ability to bridge technology, engineering, and business
  • Strong stakeholder management (CxO-level influence)
  • Entrepreneurial mindset with focus on value creation and monetization
  • Proven ability to build and lead high-performing teams


Key Success Metrics

  • AI adoption across business functions (% coverage)
  • Productivity and efficiency improvements
  • Revenue from AI-led offerings (ARR contribution)
  • Number of AI products successfully launched
  • Customer impact and satisfaction from AI solutions
  • Strength of AI ecosystem partnerships


Why This Role is Critical

This role sits at the intersection of engineering excellence, digital innovation, and business transformation, and will define how TCE evolves into:

  • An AI-first engineering enterprise
  • A leader in Industrial AI + Digital Twin solutions
  • A platform-led digital business with recurring revenue streams

items.title: Head of Machine Learning
items.description: Company Description Giggso, founded in 2017 in Michigan, is dedicated to assisting enterprises with digital transformation. As a certified Minority Business Enterprise (MBE), we provide unique perspectives to solve complex challenges. We specialize in advancing Fortune 500 companies from "AI pilots" to "AI profit centers" by focusing on the intersection of Governance, Risk, Compliance (GRC), and Engineering. Our mission is to transform AI governance from a barrier into a competitive edge. Learn more at www.giggso.com. Role Description Giggso is seeking a Head of Machine Learning for a full-time, on-site position at our Chennai office. This leadership role involves designing and implementing advanced machine learning models, overseeing applied research in pattern recognition and natural language processing, building scalable AI solutions, and driving innovation in AI governance, risk, and compliance. Additional responsibilities include mentoring a team of data scientists and engineers, collaborating cross-functionally, and aligning AI strategies with business objectives. Qualifications Expertise in Machine Learning, Data Science, and Pattern RecognitionProficiency in Natural Language Processing (NLP) and related modeling techniquesStrong foundational knowledge of Computer Science principlesProven experience in leading AI projects and deploying production-level machine learning solutionsExceptional problem-solving skills and the ability to translate complex data into actionable insightsStrong leadership and team mentorship abilitiesAdvanced degree (Master's or PhD) in Computer Science, AI, or related fields is preferredFamiliarity with AI governance frameworks and compliance standards is a plus
items.descriptionHtml:
Company Description

Giggso, founded in 2017 in Michigan, is dedicated to assisting enterprises with digital transformation. As a certified Minority Business Enterprise (MBE), we provide unique perspectives to solve complex challenges. We specialize in advancing Fortune 500 companies from "AI pilots" to "AI profit centers" by focusing on the intersection of Governance, Risk, Compliance (GRC), and Engineering. Our mission is to transform AI governance from a barrier into a competitive edge. Learn more at www.giggso.com.

Role Description

Giggso is seeking a Head of Machine Learning for a full-time, on-site position at our Chennai office. This leadership role involves designing and implementing advanced machine learning models, overseeing applied research in pattern recognition and natural language processing, building scalable AI solutions, and driving innovation in AI governance, risk, and compliance. Additional responsibilities include mentoring a team of data scientists and engineers, collaborating cross-functionally, and aligning AI strategies with business objectives.

Qualifications
  • Expertise in Machine Learning, Data Science, and Pattern Recognition
  • Proficiency in Natural Language Processing (NLP) and related modeling techniques
  • Strong foundational knowledge of Computer Science principles
  • Proven experience in leading AI projects and deploying production-level machine learning solutions
  • Exceptional problem-solving skills and the ability to translate complex data into actionable insights
  • Strong leadership and team mentorship abilities
  • Advanced degree (Master's or PhD) in Computer Science, AI, or related fields is preferred
  • Familiarity with AI governance frameworks and compliance standards is a plus

It begins with bold ideas, relentless execution and people who want to build what’s next.If you’re driven by purpose and thrive in environments where your work defines the next chapter of an industry, you’ll feel right at home here.About the Role:We are looking for a high-agency AI leader to drive end-to-end AI transformation across CoinDCX.This role is responsible for identifying high-impact AI opportunities across business functions, building practical implementation roadmaps, and ensuring execution that delivers measurable efficiency, cost, risk, and revenue improvements.What You’ll Do:Enterprise AI Strategy: Conduct a structured evaluation across all functions to identify automation, augmentation, and intelligence-led transformation opportunities.  Develop and own a company-wide AI Charter outlining strategy, prioritisation framework, governance model, capability-building plan, and success metrics. At CoinDCX, our mission is clear - to make crypto and blockchain accessible to every Indian and enable them to participate in the future of finance.

As India’s first crypto unicorn valued at $2.45B, we are reshaping the financial ecosystem by building safe, transparent, and scalable products that power adoption at scale.

We believe that change starts together. It begins with bold ideas, relentless execution and people who want to build what’s next.

If you’re driven by purpose and thrive in environments where your work defines the next chapter of an industry, you’ll feel right at home here.

About the Role:

We are looking for a high-agency AI leader to drive end-to-end AI transformation across CoinDCX.

This role is responsible for identifying high-impact AI opportunities across business functions, building practical implementation roadmaps, and ensuring execution that delivers measurable efficiency, cost, risk, and revenue improvements.

What You’ll Do:

  • Enterprise AI Strategy:
  • Conduct a structured evaluation across all functions to identify automation, augmentation, and intelligence-led transformation opportunities.
  • Develop and own a company-wide AI Charter outlining strategy, prioritisation framework, governance model, capability-building plan, and success metrics.
  • Translate business priorities into a phased AI roadmap aligned with company OKRs and long-term strategy.

2 AI Implementation & Execution:

  • Own end-to-end implementation of AI solutions, from use-case definition to production rollout.
  • Embed LLMs, AI agents, predictive systems, and automation into core workflows, redesigning processes to be AI-enabled rather than AI-assisted.
  • Ensure all deployments are scalable, secure, compliant, and measurable.
  • Establish structured impact tracking mechanisms to measure adoption, performance improvements, and ROI.

3 Productivity, ROI & Governance

  • Drive measurable impact by reducing manual effort, operational costs, turnaround times, and error rates.
  • Quantify business impact for every initiative and track realised value against projections.
  • Establish guardrails, governance frameworks, and best practices to ensure responsible AI adoption in a regulated crypto environment.

You’ll Excel in This Role If You:

  • 6 to 8+ years of total experience across AI/ML, automation, or digital transformation
  • Proven track record of deploying AI in production environments
  • Experience working with LLMs, agents, and workflow automation systems
  • Prior experience in fintech, crypto, high-growth tech startup, or consulting preferred

You’ll Know You’re Winning When:

 1 Success Criteria & Measurement

  • Success will be measured by clear strategic alignment, measurable business impact, and disciplined governance.
  • Launch and leadership alignment on an organisation-wide AI Charter within the first 90–120 days.
  • Deployment of 5–10 high-impact AI initiatives into production within 12 months.
  • Quantifiable improvements in cost, productivity, risk control, or revenue across priority functions.
  • Documented ROI tracking with realised value reported quarterly.
  • Implementation of governance guardrails with zero major compliance or data-risk incidents.

2 Technical Capabilities

  • Strong understanding of:
  • LLM architectures and prompting
  • Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG)
  • AI agents and orchestration frameworks
  • ML pipelines and productionisation
  • Familiarity with tools such as OpenAI APIs, LangChain, vector databases, workflow automation platforms, etc.
  • Ability to translate business problems into technical AI solutions

3 Operating Style

  • High ownership and bias for execution
  • Structured thinker with strong prioritisation ability
  • Strong cross-functional collaborator
  • Comfortable working directly with founders and leadership

Hiring Process:

Here’s what your journey with us looks like:

  • Application Review – We assess for skills, alignment, and intent
  • Recruiter Connect – A short conversation to understand you better
  • Functional Round(s) – Deep dive into your approach, craft, and problem-solving
  • Assignment / Simulation Round – A take-home task or live problem-solving exercise to understand how you think and execute in real scenarios
  • Culture & Values Discussion – A conversation to understand our ways of working and how you thrive best
  • Founder Conversation (Optional) – For certain roles and senior levels, you may meet our founders to explore strategic alignment and long-term fit

Where We Work:

We believe the best ideas emerge when people build together. Collaboration, speed and trust come alive when teams share the same space.

With this belief, we operate as a work-from-office organisation. This role is based out of our Bengaluru office, where energy, alignment and innovation move in real time.

Perks That Empower You:

We believe great people deserve great experiences.

  • Design Your Own Benefits: Flexible perks to match your lifestyle
  • Unlimited Wellness Leaves: Rest and recharge as you need
  • Mental Wellness Support: Access to therapy and wellness resources
  • Learning Sessions: Bi-weekly learning and growth opportunities

Ready to Build What’s Next?

If you’re looking for a role that gives you direct access to high-stakes decisions, deep impact and a chance to build the future of finance, this is it.

Join CoinDCX and help us make crypto accessible to every Indian, together.

items.title: Leading Associate Vice President - AI & Data Solutions Hub [T500-25271]
items.description: About Deutsche Börse Group:Headquartered in Frankfurt, Germany, Deutsche Börse Group is a leading international exchange organization and market infrastructure provider. They empower investors, financial institutions, and companies by facilitating access to global capital markets. Their India center is located in Hyderabad, serves as a key strategic hub and comprises India’s top-tier tech talent. They focus on crafting advanced IT solutions that elevate market infrastructure and services. Deutsche Börse Group in India is composed of a team of capital market engineers forming the backbone of financial markets worldwide.Field of activity: Corporate IT of Deutsche Börse Group oversees end user workplace experience, voice & communication, application development and operations for all group processes such as Financial Core, Customer Care, Control & Corporate Processes, as well as Deutsche Börse Group’s implements the Groups Digital Transformation initiative through the AI Platforms & Corporate Data delivery team. We also develop and operate and Enterprise Analytics platform, which is the core of collaboration, sharing and measuring our group’s success. Our mission is simple – Make IT Run!  As Head of Unit for AI & Data Solutions Hub (f/m/d) within Corporate IT, you will lead a team of AI & Analytics Experts, Data Engineers with diverse experience and backgrounds. You will own the development and delivery of a growing AI & Data landscape, managing application developers and architects and interfacing with all stakeholders from product management and product owners to platform, infrastructure, security and cloud development teams to secure the product roadmap. As an ideal candidate to head the AI & Data Solutions Hub, you will help all group functions and business users in translating their AI & data into meaningful information for quantitative decision making and intelligent steering. If you strive to take ownership and develop creative solutions, are fascinated by technology, and like to work in a challenging and fast paced environment – then you are exactly the person we are looking for. Tasks / Responsibilities:Lead the evolution, scalability, and reliability of the organization’s AI and Data platforms delivery team. Define and execute strategic plans for AI and Data, oversee implementation, enhancements, and ongoing operations. Develop end to end solution strategies and a clear roadmap for AI, data and analytics capabilities aligned with business needs. Translate business strategy into an information and analytics strategy with a strong focus on the enablement of business stakeholders via the utilization of AI and advanced data methodologies. Act as a role model people leader and senior expert—fostering talent, coaching team members, and building a high performing organization. Participate in high-level meetings and presentations to showcase the delivery capabilities and value proposition Lead effectively in an agile environment, continuously driving improvement across teams and initiatives. Apply design thinking and solution, oriented approaches to deliver innovative, practical outcomes. Stay current on emerging technologies, data trends, and skills needed to proactively evolve the team. Support strategic and compliance (2nd line of defense) initiatives within Corporate IT. Qualifications/ Required skills: 15+ years’ experience delivering analytics solutions across cloud and on-premises environments. Proven leadership of complex system integrations (Cloud to Cloud, SAP to SAP, non-SAP to SAP), ensuring the right expertise is brought together to deliver successfully. Strong understanding of business operations, data mesh concepts, data domains, and data products, with the ability to translate them into AI driven business value. Hands on expertise with modern data and analytics platforms (Google BigQuery, Databricks, SAP BW/4HANA) and AI services/technologies (Vertex AI/Gemini). Good knowledge in designing and delivering analytics front end solutions using SAP Analytics Cloud, Microsoft Power BI, and Google Looker. Deliver SAP MDG (Master Data Governance) related projects, including new implementations, upgrades, and enhancements.-(no need). Solid grounding in engineering practices and IT processes including change, release, and incident management. Experienced in agile project delivery, driving agile ways of working within IT and in collaboration with business teams. Strong documentation and presentation skills, able to convey complex topics clearly and convincingly up to Clever audiences. Excellent written and spoken English. Regular operational tasks with Function leads. Projects / Change Requests / Enhancements: Align with team, ensure every delivery is broken down to the tasks level. Setting up sprints in JIRA and aligning with client teams on the deliveries that will be done in the sprint. Setting up of tasks, sub tasks in JIRA, assignment of tasks for individuals in the team, tracking and monitoring of the tasks. Organize daily stand-up calls with the team, stay connected with the team on the progress of tasks assigned. Tracking delays on completion of tasks, understanding of the reasons for delays. Incidents Management: Continuous monitoring of tool, assignment of tickets to the right associate in the team. Alignment with client IT team to ensure priority of individual tickets is appropriately set. Focus on priority / emergency bugs. Ensure backlog is always kept under control. Continuous discussion with the team to address backlog. Ensure periodic updates sent to all stakeholders Very effective stakeholders’ management across the different teams.

We also develop and operate and Enterprise Analytics platform, which is the core of collaboration, sharing and measuring our group’s success.


Our mission is simple – Make IT Run!

As Head of Unit for AI & Data Solutions Hub (f/m/d) within Corporate IT, you will lead a team of AI & Analytics Experts, Data Engineers with diverse experience and backgrounds. You will own the development and delivery of a growing AI & Data landscape, managing application developers and architects and interfacing with all stakeholders from product management and product owners to platform, infrastructure, security and cloud development teams to secure the product roadmap. As an ideal candidate to head the AI & Data Solutions Hub, you will help all group functions and business users in translating their AI & data into meaningful information for quantitative decision making and intelligent steering.

If you strive to take ownership and develop creative solutions, are fascinated by technology, and like to work in a challenging and fast paced environment – then you are exactly the person we are looking for.


Tasks / Responsibilities:

  • Lead the evolution, scalability, and reliability of the organization’s AI and Data platforms delivery team.
  • Define and execute strategic plans for AI and Data, oversee implementation, enhancements, and ongoing operations.
  • Develop end to end solution strategies and a clear roadmap for AI, data and analytics capabilities aligned with business needs.
  • Translate business strategy into an information and analytics strategy with a strong focus on the enablement of business stakeholders via the utilization of AI and advanced data methodologies.
  • Act as a role model people leader and senior expert—fostering talent, coaching team members, and building a high performing organization.
  • Participate in high-level meetings and presentations to showcase the delivery capabilities and value proposition Lead effectively in an agile environment, continuously driving improvement across teams and initiatives.
  • Apply design thinking and solution, oriented approaches to deliver innovative, practical outcomes.
  • Stay current on emerging technologies, data trends, and skills needed to proactively evolve the team.
  • Support strategic and compliance (2nd line of defense) initiatives within Corporate IT.


Qualifications/ Required skills:

  • 15+ years’ experience delivering analytics solutions across cloud and on-premises environments.
  • Proven leadership of complex system integrations (Cloud to Cloud, SAP to SAP, non-SAP to SAP), ensuring the right expertise is brought together to deliver successfully.
  • Strong understanding of business operations, data mesh concepts, data domains, and data products, with the ability to translate them into AI driven business value.
  • Hands on expertise with modern data and analytics platforms (Google BigQuery, Databricks, SAP BW/4HANA) and AI services/technologies (Vertex AI/Gemini).
  • Good knowledge in designing and delivering analytics front end solutions using SAP Analytics Cloud, Microsoft Power BI, and Google Looker.
  • Deliver SAP MDG (Master Data Governance) related projects, including new implementations, upgrades, and enhancements.-(no need).
  • Solid grounding in engineering practices and IT processes including change, release, and incident management.
  • Experienced in agile project delivery, driving agile ways of working within IT and in collaboration with business teams.
  • Strong documentation and presentation skills, able to convey complex topics clearly and convincingly up to Clever audiences.
  • Excellent written and spoken English.
  • Regular operational tasks with Function leads.


Projects / Change Requests / Enhancements:

  • Align with team, ensure every delivery is broken down to the tasks level.
  • Setting up sprints in JIRA and aligning with client teams on the deliveries that will be done in the sprint.
  • Setting up of tasks, sub tasks in JIRA, assignment of tasks for individuals in the team, tracking and monitoring of the tasks.
  • Organize daily stand-up calls with the team, stay connected with the team on the progress of tasks assigned.
  • Tracking delays on completion of tasks, understanding of the reasons for delays.


Incidents Management:

  • Continuous monitoring of tool, assignment of tickets to the right associate in the team.
  • Alignment with client IT team to ensure priority of individual tickets is appropriately set.
  • Focus on priority / emergency bugs.
  • Ensure backlog is always kept under control. Continuous discussion with the team to address backlog.
  • Ensure periodic updates sent to all stakeholders
  • Very effective stakeholders’ management across the different teams.

items.descriptionHtml:
Our Mission

At Palo Alto Networks®, we’re united by a shared mission—to protect our digital way of life. We thrive at the intersection of innovation and impact, solving real-world problems with cutting-edge technology and bold thinking. Here, everyone has a voice, and every idea counts. If you’re ready to do the most meaningful work of your career alongside people who are just as passionate as you are, you’re in the right place.

Who We Are

In order to be the cybersecurity partner of choice, we must trailblaze the path and shape the future of our industry. This is something our employees work at each day and is defined by our values: Disruption, Collaboration, Execution, Integrity, and Inclusion. We weave AI into the fabric of everything we do and use it to augment the impact every individual can have. If you are passionate about solving real-world problems and ideating beside the best and the brightest, we invite you to join us!

We believe collaboration thrives in person. That’s why most of our teams work from the office full time, with flexibility when it’s needed. This model supports real-time problem-solving, stronger relationships, and the kind of precision that drives great outcomes.

Job Summary

We are seeking a Director of Software Engineering to lead the development of next-generation Autonomous AI Agents for our Go-to-Market (GTM) and Customer Experience (CX) Applications Engineering team based in Bangalore.

Key Responsibilities

  • Define the engineering vision and roadmap for Autonomous AI Agents that transform global GTM and CX workflows and operations.
  • Lead and scale a high-performing software engineering organization delivering enterprise-grade autonomous agents and multi-agent systems using technologies such as LangGraph, AutoGen, CrewAI, Semantic Kernel, and AgentKit.
  • Establish robust LLMOps and AI governance practices covering prompt management, vector databases, retrieval systems, evaluation frameworks, and hallucination mitigation.
  • Partner closely with Product Management, Customer Experience, Sales Operations, Data Science, and Enterprise Architecture teams to align AI initiatives with business growth.
  • Drive engineering excellence across architecture, reliability, scalability, observability, security, and operational readiness.
  • Champion AI-assisted software engineering practices leveraging tools such as GitHub Copilot, Cursor, Claude Code, and internal developer copilots to modernize software delivery.
  • Recruit, mentor, and develop engineering managers, architects, and senior engineers across globally distributed teams.

Qualifications

Required Qualifications

  • Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related technical discipline.
  • 15 or more years of software engineering experience, with at least 7 years leading large, globally distributed engineering organizations.
  • Proven experience building AI copilots, autonomous agents, conversational AI, or enterprise automation platforms.
  • Technical expertise in LLMOps, vector databases, RAG architectures, evaluation pipelines, and AI observability.
  • Experience with frameworks such as LangGraph, Semantic Kernel, AutoGen, CrewAI, LangChain, or AgentKit.
  • Proven experience building and scaling distributed, cloud-native enterprise platforms, microservices, and event-driven systems.
  • Experience delivering enterprise-grade SaaS products or platforms supporting GTM, CRM, CX, or workflow automation domains.
  • Strong experience with public cloud ecosystems such as Azure, AWS, or Google Cloud.

Preferred Qualifications

  • Proven experience building applications specifically designed for GTM motions, customer success, and support.
  • Extensive knowledge of operational workflows, enterprise tools, and the opportunity-to-cash lifecycle.
  • Familiarity with Responsible AI, AI governance, security, compliance, and privacy frameworks.
  • Experience driving engineering productivity transformations using AI-assisted development tools.

Our Commitment

We’re trailblazers that dream big, take risks, and challenge cybersecurity’s status quo. It’s simple: we can’t accomplish our mission without diverse teams innovating, together.

We are committed to providing reasonable accommodations for all qualified individuals with a disability. If you require assistance or accommodation due to a disability or special need, please contact us at accommodations@paloaltonetworks.com.

Palo Alto Networks is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity in our workplace, and all qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to age, ancestry, color, family or medical care leave, gender identity or expression, genetic information, marital status, medical condition, national origin, physical or mental disability, political affiliation, protected veteran status, race, religion, sex (including pregnancy), sexual orientation, or other legally protected characteristics.

All your information will be kept confidential according to EEO guidelines.

Is role eligible for Immigration Sponsorship? No. Please note that we will not sponsor applicants for work visas for this position.

items.descriptionHtml:
Engineering Leader — Echo

Location: Hyderabad | Type: Full-time


Role Overview

Lead engineering for Echo, an enterprise conversational BI platform that converts natural language into SQL across SAP and enterprise data systems.

This is a hands-on leadership role responsible for platform architecture, AI/LLM infrastructure, deployment strategy, and engineering team build-out. The role requires active involvement in coding, system design, and enterprise deployments.

Key Responsibilities

  • Own architecture and delivery of Echo’s NL-to-SQL, RAG, and orchestration stack
  • Lead cloud and on-prem AI deployments including GPU infrastructure, model serving, and security
  • Drive technical decisions across LLMs, agents, RAG frameworks, and evaluation systems
  • Build and manage the engineering team, code quality, and release processes
  • Partner with Product leadership on roadmap and execution planning
  • Support enterprise customers during complex technical deployments


Required Experience

  • 10+ years in software engineering with 3+ years leading production systems
  • Strong hands-on experience with LLMs, RAG, function calling, and hallucination control
  • Experience deploying AI workloads in on-prem/GPU-based environments
  • Strong coding and architecture ownership experience
  • Proven team-building and engineering leadership capability


Preferred Experience

  • Background in BI, analytics, database, or data platform products
  • Experience with NL-to-SQL or conversational analytics platforms
  • Familiarity with SAP BW, HANA, or S/4
  • Open-source or research contributions in AI/LLM systems

items.descriptionHtml:
About PhonePe Limited:

Headquartered in India, its flagship product, the PhonePe digital payments app, was launched in Aug 2016. As of April 2025, PhonePe has over 60 Crore (600 Million) registered users and a digital payments acceptance network spread across over 4 Crore (40+ million) merchants. PhonePe also processes over 33 Crore (330+ Million) transactions daily with an Annualized Total Payment Value (TPV) of over INR 150 lakh crore.

PhonePe’s portfolio of businesses includes the distribution of financial products (Insurance, Lending, and Wealth) as well as new consumer tech businesses (Pincode - hyperlocal e-commerce and Indus AppStore Localized App Store for the Android ecosystem) in India, which are aligned with the company’s vision to offer every Indian an equal opportunity to accelerate their progress by unlocking the flow of money and access to services.

Culture:

At PhonePe, we go the extra mile to make sure you can bring your best self to work, Everyday!. And that starts with creating the right environment for you. We empower people and trust them to do the right thing. Here, you own your work from start to finish, right from day one. PhonePe-rs solve complex problems and execute quickly; often building frameworks from scratch. If you’re excited by the idea of building platforms that touch millions, ideating with some of the best minds in the country and executing on your dreams with purpose and speed, join us!

About The Role

This is a senior leadership position where you work alongside the Group CMO, the Content Head, and the Youtube strategy lead to build a world-class, AI-first content factory. You are the architect of our production engine. Your job is to take high-level concepts and turn them into finished products that set a new standard for the industry. You lead a diverse team of creators, editors, and designers with an AI-first mindset and lead our relationships with global creative agencies. You are a workflow builder who is obsessed with finding faster and better ways to produce content without ever letting the quality slip.

Focus Area 1: Strategic Leadership

You are the conductor of the factory. You don't just execute, you lead the way.

  • You work directly with the Group CMO and Content Head to make sure our production output matches the big-picture brand goals.
  • You lead the internal team of creators, editors, designers, DOPs, and Video Specialists.
  • You are responsible for their daily output and making sure they are operating at peak performance.
  • You manage the production roadmap. You decide how we use our resources and you make the final call on what we build in-house versus what we send to outside partners.

Focus Area 2: World-Class Agency Management

You are our main link to the best creative minds in the world.

  • You will manage relationships and output with top-tier agencies like Ogilvy, Dentsu, or specialized production houses.
  • You make sure these external partners are integrated into our AI-first ways of working. Their delivery must match our internal speed and technical standards.
  • You lead the negotiations and the daily management of these partnerships to ensure we are always getting world-class results.

Focus Area 3: Quality Gatekeeping

You are the final line of defense for our brand.

  • You are the ultimate judge of quality. You ensure that every frame, every cut, and every thumbnail meets our high visual and storytelling standards.
  • You run the final review process. You have the eye to catch the small errors in sound, editing, or visual consistency that others might miss.
  • You balance the speed of AI with human emotion. You make sure the final product feels premium and authentic, never substandard or robotic.

Focus Area 4: AI Systems and Workflow Architecture

You own the "how" of our factory. You build the digital production line.

  • Build End-to-End Pipelines: You design the step-by-step systems that move a project from a finished script to a final render. You find ways to connect different AI tools so the work flows seamlessly without manual restarts.
  • Deploy AI Agents: You set up and manage AI agents to handle specialized, repetitive tasks. This could be anything from agents that automatically source b-roll to agents that handle audio cleanup or initial color grading.
  • Automate for Scale: You are obsessed with removing bottlenecks. You find the parts of production that take the most time and you build an AI-driven solution to automate them.
  • Tool Integration: You stay ahead of the curve. You are the one testing new AI video models and automated editing tools, deciding exactly how they should be used by the team to increase our speed.

What We Are Looking For

  • AI Fluency: You are a power user of AI. You don't just use it for simple tasks; you understand how to build workflows and chain different AI tools together to solve complex production problems.
  • Technical Agility: You are a fast learner who can master new tech by lunch. You understand everything from traditional cinematography to the latest AI video models.
  • Senior Management Experience: You have a proven track record of leading large creative teams and managing big-name agencies.
  • Attention to Detail: You have an obsessive eye for quality. You don't settle for "good enough" and you push the team to deliver excellence.
  • Problem Solving: You are a builder. You don't wait for a plan to be handed to you. You see a bottleneck and you build a prototype to clear it.
  • High Ownership: You treat this factory as if it were your own company. You take full responsibility for the output, the deadlines, and the quality.

PhonePe Full Time Employee Benefits (Not applicable for Intern or Contract Roles)

  • Insurance Benefits - Medical Insurance, Critical Illness Insurance, Accidental Insurance, Life Insurance
  • Wellness Program - Employee Assistance Program, Onsite Medical Center, Emergency Support System
  • Parental Support - Maternity Benefit, Paternity Benefit Program, Adoption Assistance Program, Day-care Support Program
  • Mobility Benefits - Relocation benefits, Transfer Support Policy, Travel Policy
  • Retirement Benefits - Employee PF Contribution, Flexible PF Contribution, Gratuity, NPS, Leave Encashment
  • Other Benefits - Higher Education Assistance, Car Lease, Salary Advance Policy

Our inclusive culture promotes individual expression, creativity, innovation, and achievement and in turn helps us better understand and serve our customers. We see ourselves as a place for intellectual curiosity, ideas and debates, where diverse perspectives lead to deeper understanding and better quality results. PhonePe is an equal opportunity employer and is committed to treating all its employees and job applicants equally; regardless of gender, sexual preference, religion, race, color or disability. If you have a disability or special need that requires assistance or reasonable accommodation, during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please fill out this form.

Read more about PhonePe on our blog.

items.descriptionHtml:
About Pratiti Technologies

Pratiti Technologies is a software engineering company specializing in building high-quality digital products and platforms for global enterprises and Global Capability Centers (GCCs). With deep expertise in Foundation Technologies, Cloud Computing, Data Engineering, and modern software architectures, Pratiti delivers engineering excellence across the full product lifecycle — from concept and design to delivery and operations.


Committed to a culture of collaboration, craftsmanship, and continuous innovation, Pratiti partners with enterprises and GCCs to solve complex engineering challenges through thoughtful, scalable software solutions. With a strong global presence spanning multiple geographies, Pratiti brings a unique blend of domain depth and technology expertise to every engagement — helping customers build software that lasts and scales.


At Pratiti, software engineering isn't a function — it's the foundation of everything we do.


Role Description

We are looking for a young, energetic, and hands-on Practice Head for Software Engineering — someone who has lived and breathed AI-augmented engineering and is passionate about shaping the future of how software is built. This is a strategic leadership role that sits at the intersection of customer engagement, pre-sales, and internal competency building. You will be the face of our Software Engineering practice, evangelising our AI-first approach with customers while simultaneously driving excellence and innovation within our engineering teams.


Key Responsibilities

1. Pre-Sales & Customer Engagement

  • Lead pre-sales engagements for software engineering opportunities — own the solutioning, estimation, and technical narrative that wins deals.
  • Craft and present compelling proposals, PoCs, and demos that showcase Pratiti's AI-first engineering capabilities to prospects and customers.
  • Partner with the business development team as the technical anchor, translating customer problems into differentiated engineering solutions.
  • Advise customers on their AI adoption journey across the software engineering lifecycle, from tooling strategy to process transformation.
  • Build and maintain relationships with key technical stakeholders (CTOs, VPs of Engineering, Architects) at customer organisations.


2. Practice & Competency Development

  • Define and drive Pratiti's Software Engineering practice strategy — service offerings, capability frameworks, toolsets, and delivery methodologies.
  • Build and mature competency across the full engineering lifecycle: requirements, architecture, AI-assisted coding, quality engineering, DevSecOps, and xOps.
  • Establish and evolve standards, playbooks, and best practices for AI-augmented software engineering delivery.
  • Identify, evaluate, and institutionalise the right AI tools and platforms (Copilot, Cursor, Devin, CodeWhisperer, etc.) to boost team productivity and quality.
  • Create and run training programmes, hackathons, and knowledge-sharing sessions to upskill engineering teams continuously.
  • Measure and communicate practice performance through metrics such as velocity uplift, defect reduction, and time-to-value from AI adoption.


3. Thought Leadership & Ecosystem

  • Represent Pratiti externally through conference talks, white papers, blogs, and community engagement on AI-transformed engineering.
  • Track emerging trends in AI for software engineering (Agentic AI, LLM-based code generation, AI-driven testing) and translate them into practice offerings.
  • Collaborate with product and research teams to contribute to Pratiti's internal AI accelerators and frameworks.


What We Are Looking For

Experience & Qualifications

  • Total experience of 8 to 15 years in software engineering — we value depth over tenure.
  • At least 2 years of demonstrated, hands-on experience applying AI to transform software engineering practices — not just experimenting, but delivering results.
  • Proven track record in customer-facing roles: pre-sales, solutioning, or consulting.
  • Strong background in building and growing engineering practices, teams, or centres of excellence.
  • B.E./B.Tech/M.Tech in Computer Science, Engineering, or equivalent; MBA is a plus but not required.


Technical Depth

  • Deep, working knowledge of AI coding assistants, AI-driven testing tools, and LLM-based development workflows.
  • Hands-on experience with modern software engineering: cloud-native architecture, DevSecOps, microservices, API design.
  • Familiarity with the end-to-end software engineering lifecycle and how AI is reshaping each phase — requirements (AI-assisted analysis), design (AI-aided architecture), coding (code generation/review), QE (autonomous testing), and xOps (AIOps, intelligent observability).
  • Exposure to agentic AI frameworks, multi-agent systems for software development, or LLM fine-tuning for engineering use cases is a strong differentiator.


Leadership & Communication

  • Natural leader who can inspire engineers and earn the trust of C-suite customer stakeholders in the same week.
  • Strong written and verbal communication — you can write a sharp blog post and deliver a boardroom presentation with equal confidence.
  • High energy, growth mindset, and an entrepreneurial bias for action — comfortable with ambiguity and rapid change.
  • Collaborative team player who can influence without authority across sales, delivery, and technology functions.

items.descriptionHtml:
Introduction

Job Title:

Senior Director, Data Science

Overview:

SymphonyAI is a leading enterprise AI solutions provider empowering retailers and manufacturers to optimize business operations through customer insights. Our innovative technology and strategic collaboration position us as a preferred partner for leading retailers and manufacturers globally.

Job Description

Responsibilities:

Strategic Leadership:

  • Lead and develop the Data Science and ML Engineering teams to deliver actionable business insights and production-grade ML solutions.
  • Collaborate with senior leadership to define the analytics and AI roadmap aligned to retail business priorities (pricing, promotions, assortment, personalized marketing, and customer experience).

Team Management and Mentoring:

  • Build, mentor, and retain a high-performing team of data scientists and machine learning engineers.
  • Foster a culture of innovation, continuous learning, and excellence.

Solution Design and Delivery:

  • Oversee end-to-end delivery of advanced analytics and machine learning projects, from ideation to deployment and ongoing optimization.
  • Architect and implement scalable models for price optimization, promotion effectiveness, assortment planning, demand forecasting, and personalized marketing.

Hands-on Technical Oversight:

  • Guide the team in leveraging modern data science tools and frameworks (Python, R, Spark).
  • Champion the adoption and integration of GenAI (Generative AI) for real-world retail applications (e.g., automated content creation, chatbot solutions, recommendation systems).

Deployment & Integration:

  • Drive best practices for robust model deployment and MLOps, ensuring seamless integration of models into retail software platforms or products.
  • Work closely with product and engineering teams to operationalize data science solutions at scale.

Required Skills & Qualifications:

About you:

  • 10+ years of industry experience in data science and machine learning; min 3+ years in a leadership role managing data science and/or ML engineering teams.
  • Demonstrated expertise in retail analytics (price optimization, promotion analytics, assortment planning, personalization, customer segmentation, etc.).
  • Advanced degree (PhD/Masters) in Computer Science, Statistics, Mathematics, Data Science, or related field.
  • Extensive hands-on experience in Python (scikit-learn, pandas, TensorFlow/PyTorch), R, and Spark.
  • Proven experience with designing, building, and deploying production-grade ML models and integrating with existing business software/systems.
  • Strong understanding of MLOps, Cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, Azure) and containerization (Docker, Kubernetes) is highly desirable.
  • Experience with GenAI frameworks, applications, and responsible AI principles.

Compensation & Benefits:

  • Competitive salary and benefits package.
  • Opportunities to work on innovative, cutting-edge technology projects.
  • Supportive, collaborative, and technically enriching work environment.
  • Professional growth and upskilling opportunities.

Diversity & Inclusion Statement:

We are committed to building a diverse and inclusive team and encourage candidates from all backgrounds to apply.

About Us

SymphonyAI is building the leading enterprise AI SaaS company for digital transformation across the most critical and resilient growth industries, including retail, consumer packaged goods, financial crime prevention, manufacturing, media, and IT service management. Since its founding in 2017, SymphonyAI today serves 1500+ Enterprise customers globally and has grown to 3,000 talented leaders, data scientists, and other professionals across over 30 countries.

Responsibilities

About the AI Innovation Lab

The AI Innovation Lab enables rapid testing of new AI ideas to validate their technical feasibility and business value. A critical input into this process is strong outside‑in research—understanding market trends, emerging technologies, competitor moves, and evolving best practices to ensure the Lab’s backlog and POCs are forward‑looking, relevant, and strategically aligned.

Role Overview

This role leads the end-to-end AI innovation engine, connecting enterprise strategy to rapid experimentation and measurable business outcomes. Responsible for translating executive priorities into a prioritized AI portfolio, orchestrating cross-functional teams through rapid innovation cycles, and ensuring concepts move from ideation to POC to execution at a rapid pace.

Operates at the intersection of business strategy, operating model design, and AI delivery, ensuring that innovation is not isolated but embedded into how the organization drives growth, efficiency, and transformation.

  • Requires simultaneous fluency in strategy, finance, and AI delivery (not sequential handoffs)
  • Must drive executive alignment and funding decisions in parallel with experimentation
  • Owns portfolio-level value realization, not just individual use cases
  • Balances speed (weeks) with governance and enterprise integration
  • Aligned with emerging AI trends and agentic patterns in the market to bring this expertise to the innovation lab

What You Will Do

  • AI Strategy to Execution Translation
  • Translate enterprise strategy into a prioritized AI innovation backlog (core, emerging, transformative)
  • Define value hypotheses, ROI models, and success metrics for each use case
  • Ensure alignment to business priorities and executive sponsorship before build
  • Innovation Lab Leadership
  • Lead rapid experimentation cycles (4–8 weeks) from ideation through POC validation
  • Establish and govern intake, prioritization, and stage-gate decision frameworks
  • Drive disciplined decision-making on
    • what enters the lab
    • what scales
    • what stops
    • Operating Model & Transformation Design
    • Design AI-enabled operating models, including workforce, processes, and governance
    • Ensure solutions are structured for repeatability, reuse, and enterprise scale
    • Embed AI into broader business model and go-to-market transformation
    • Executive Stakeholder Leadership

  • Partner with C-suite, functional and BU leaders to
    • Define business cases for funding and sponsorship
    • Align on priorities and trade-offs
    • Drive adoption and change
  • Act as translator between business ambition and technical reality
  • Value Realization & Scaling
  • Ensure POCs deliver quantifiable business impact (cost, revenue, CX)
  • Define pathways to execution factory / production deployment
  • Track and communicate enterprise-level value realization (~$MM impact)
Qualifications

Who You Are:

  • Bringing a Bachelor’s or Master’s degree - B.E. / B.Tech / M.S. / M.Tech / MCA degree in Computer Science, Technology, Engineering, Mathematics or a related subject area
  • 12–18+ years across strategy, transformation, and technology delivery
  • Proven experience leading enterprise-scale transformation programs
  • Direct experience with:
    • AI / GenAI strategy and use case development
    • Operating model redesign
    • Business case development and investment governance
  • Background spanning consulting + industry leadership strongly preferred
Skills That Will Help You Stand Out

  • Moves seamlessly from boardroom strategy to sprint execution
  • Deep expertise in value framing, prioritization, and portfolio governance
  • Ability to drive behavior change and adoption, not just design solutions
  • Experience building repeatable innovation engines, not one-off pilots

Additional Information

Why Join the AI Innovation Lab?

  • Work across a diverse set of high‑impact AI ideas rather than a single long‑lived pipeline.
  • Operate in a fast‑paced, learning‑first environment that values pragmatism over perfection.
  • Directly influence how quickly AI ideas move from concept to validated proof points.

Our Engineering Culture

Through our Agile/Lean DevOps environment dedicated to delivering valuable solutions, we’ve fostered a culture of innovation and experimentation across our development teams. As a customer-focused organization, we work closely with our end users and product owners to understand and rapidly respond to emerging business needs.

Collaboration is embedded into everything we do – from the products we develop to the quality service we provide. We’re driven by the belief that diversity of thought, background, and perspective is critical to creating the best products and experiences for our customers.

items.descriptionHtml:
Senior Director, Search (Data Sciences & Engineering)

About Us

Working at Target means helping all families discover the joy of everyday life. Every time a guest searches on Target.com or in the Target app, they are interacting with one of the most critical and high-impact systems in retail.

Search is the front door to digital commerce. It shapes discovery, trust, confidence, and conversion at massive scale. As Target continues to modernize our digital experiences, we are investing in building the next generation of intelligent, agentic search—moving from keyword matching to intent understanding, reasoning, and guided shopping experiences powered by advanced AI.

Role Overview

As the Senior Director of Search, you will lead a global organization of 60+ engineers, data scientists, and technical leaders responsible for building and evolving Target’s end-to-end Search ecosystem.

This role is accountable for the technical strategy, architecture, AI innovation, and operational excellence behind query understanding, semantic retrieval and ranking systems, relevance AI pipelines, search platform architecture, evaluation frameworks, and conversational and agentic search capabilities.

This is a leader-of-leaders role requiring both deep AI/search expertise and exceptional organizational leadership. You will develop top-tier talent, shape technical direction, and ensure Target builds a resilient, scalable, and future-ready search platform.

What You’ll Do

Set the Technical Vision for the Future of Search

  • Define and evolve Target’s multi-year technical strategy for Search.
  • Lead the transition toward agentic and conversational search systems.
  • Advance capabilities in embeddings, semantic retrieval, transformers, reinforcement learning, and LLM-powered reasoning.
  • Balance innovation with scalability, latency, cost, reliability, and governance.

Build and Scale an Agentic Search Ecosystem

  • Develop AI systems enabling intent-aware query understanding and contextual signals.
  • Implement retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) where appropriate.
  • Enable multi-turn conversational refinement and guided shopping experiences.
  • Establish strong evaluation frameworks and experimentation systems.

Lead a High-Performing Technical Organization

  • Lead and develop a global team of 60+ engineers and scientists.
  • Build strong director-level and principal-level leadership bench strength.
  • Foster a culture of technical excellence, innovation, inclusion, and continuous learning.

Drive Responsible AI & Governance

  • Implement monitoring frameworks for AI quality, bias, safety, and privacy.
  • Ensure explainability, trust, and strong production standards.

Enterprise Partnership & Influence

  • Partner deeply with Product, UX, Engineering, Merchandising, and Digital leadership.
  • Translate AI strategy into clear executive narratives and long-term investment plans.

About You

  • Advanced degree (PhD or MS) in Computer Science, Machine Learning, AI, Mathematics, Statistics, or related field.
  • 16+ years of experience building and scaling ML/AI systems in production.
  • Deep expertise in Search and Information Retrieval, including learning-to-rank, NLP, transformers, embeddings, and retrieval architectures.
  • Experience shipping AI/ML systems at scale in high-traffic consumer environments.
  • Proven experience leading large global teams, including leader of leaders.
  • Strong executive presence and ability to influence senior stakeholders.
  • Experience integrating GenAI responsibly into consumer-facing systems preferred.

Why This Role Matters

Search is foundational to Target’s digital growth. This leader will shape how millions of guests discover products every day, define the technical future of AI-powered retail discovery, and develop the next generation of AI and engineering leaders at Target.

items.descriptionHtml:
We at Pine Labs are looking for those who share our core belief - “Every Day is Game day”. We bring our best selves to work each day to realize our mission of enriching the world through the power of digital commerce and financial services.


Role Purpose:

We are hiring an Associate Director, Strategic Partnerships, AI-led Payments, who will work closely with Sales Leadership to drive adoption of Pine Labs' emerging AI-powered payment and commerce solutions. This role sits at the intersection of sales, product, and technology, and focuses on translating complex AI capabilities into tangible business value for enterprise clients.

You will partner with senior sales leaders to shape client conversations, co-sell solutions, and build early market traction for agentic and AI-enabled payment products. This is a high-ownership role suited for individuals who can operate in evolving environments and contribute to building a new category of solutions.

Pine Labs is expanding its product portfolio to include AI-led and agentic commerce solutions that integrate intelligence into payment and financial workflows. As these products move from development to market, there is a clear need to enable enterprise adoption through solution-led selling. This requires translating new and evolving capabilities into clear, outcome-driven value propositions for large corporates and merchants. The role will support sales leadership in building this narrative, driving early adoption, and shaping go-to-market approaches for AI-enabled payment solutions.


Responsibilities we entrust you with:

  • Drive adoption of AI-led payment and commerce solutions across large enterprise clients and merchants
  • Enable successful conversion of strategic deals through solution-oriented selling and co-creation with clients
  • Establish clear, repeatable value propositions and use case narratives for AI-enabled payment offerings
  • Strengthen alignment between Sales, Product, and Engineering through structured feedback from client engagements
  • Contribute to building a scalable go-to-market approach for emerging AI products within Pine Labs
  • Partner with Sales Leaders to co-own and drive strategic client engagements for AI-led payment solutions
  • Translate product capabilities into client-specific solutions aligned to business objectives and outcomes
  • Participate in client discussions, presentations, and workshops to articulate value propositions and use cases
  • Support deal structuring including solution scope, commercials, and implementation approach
  • Collaborate with Product and Engineering teams to relay client feedback and refine offerings
  • Build industry-specific use-case narratives and solution playbooks to enable broader sales adoption
  • Track key deal progress, identify risks, and proactively drive closure in partnership with sales stakeholders


What matters in this role:

  • 6 to 12 years of experience in pre-sales, solutioning, consulting, or enterprise sales roles
  • Demonstrated transition into or exposure to full-cycle enterprise sales or strategic account management
  • Experience selling SaaS, fintech, or technology-led solutions to large enterprises preferred
  • Educational background from a reputable institution preferred
  • Proven ability to engage with multiple stakeholders in complex sales environments
  • Familiarity with SaaS, fintech, or platform-based business models
  • Exposure to payments, financial services, or emerging technology solutions
  • Comfort working in ambiguous, fast-evolving product environments


Growth & Exposure:

This role offers the opportunity to work at the forefront of AI-led commerce and payments, contributing to the early stages of category creation within Pine Labs. You will gain exposure to enterprise clients, cross-functional teams, and strategic initiatives that shape future product and go-to-market directions. The role provides a platform to build deep expertise in solution selling, emerging technologies, and large-scale commercial engagements


What Will Help You Succeed:

  • Ability to operate effectively in environments where products and narratives are still evolving
  • Comfort taking ownership and driving outcomes without fully defined playbooks
  • Strong curiosity and willingness to understand emerging technologies and their business applications
  • Practical, client-first mindset with focus on solving real business problems



What we Value in Our people

  • You take the shot: You Decide Fast and You Deliver Right
  • You are the CEO of what you do: you show ownership and make things happen
  • You own tomorrow: by building solutions for the merchants and doing the right thing
  • You sign your work like an artist: You seek to learn and take pride in the work you do
